title: Full-Service Video Editor for RV Industry Exposé Channel (Script, Voice-Over, Editing)
description:
We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented video editor to create compelling 10–15 minute videos for a YouTube channel focused on exposing the hidden problems within the modern RV industry.



This channel covers topics such as:

* How modern RVs are engineered to fail

* Cost-cutting practices manufacturers don’t disclose

* Common mechanical failures (e.g., engines, lifters, fuel-saving systems)

* Lawsuits, recalls, and real owner experiences

* Dealership tactics and what buyers aren’t told



We will provide the topic — you will handle the full production process.



**Responsibilities:**



* Research each topic thoroughly using credible sources

* Write engaging, informative scripts with a strong hook and clear storytelling

* Source high-quality, relevant footage, images, and supporting visuals

* Record a clear, professional voice-over

* Edit videos into a polished 10–15 minute final product

* Add graphics, charts, and on-screen text to support key points

* Maintain a documentary-style tone that builds trust and keeps viewers engaged



**Requirements:**



* Proven video editing experience (portfolio required)

* Strong research and storytelling ability (fact-based content)

* Ability to present technical information in a clear, engaging way

* High-quality voice-over recording (clear English)

* Experience sourcing copyright-safe footage

* Attention to detail and commitment to accuracy



Turnaround Time:

*Each video must be completed within: 2–3 days



Compensation:

$10 per completed video (10–15 minutes)**

Fixed rate — non-negotiable**



**Important:**

Only apply if you fully agree to the rate and deadline. There is **no negotiation**.

 Accuracy matters — content must be well-researched and not misleading.



**To Apply:**

Please include:

* A short introduction

* Links to your previous work (especially documentary or informational videos)

* Confirmation that you agree to the rate and turnaround time



We are looking for a long-term collaborator who can consistently deliver high-quality, engaging content.

title: Shopify Expert Needed
description:
We are a U.S.-based manufacturer of souvenir and gift products with our production facility in Hawaii. We sell wholesale to souvenir stores, gift shops, and tourist retailers across the United States.Our main objectives are:

• Enable our sales reps to place orders directly through the website on behalf of retail customers.

• Allow retail customers (souvenir stores) to log in directly, browse wholesale pricing, and place their own orders.

• Ensure all orders flow seamlessly to our Hawaii production facility for efficient processing and fulfillment.

We already use SparkLayer (Sparkle), the B2B & Wholesale app that integrates with Shopify. The developer will need to work closely with this app to implement the required functionality.This B2B wholesale website will replace much of our current manual ordering process and provide a professional, self-service portal for both sales reps and approved retailers.Key Responsibilities

• Complete Shopify store setup using Shopify 2.0

• Deep integration and configuration of SparkLayer (Sparkle) to power the B2B experience

• Build a dual-access B2B ordering system supporting two user types:

• Sales Reps: Secure login to place orders on behalf of customers, quick/bulk ordering tools, customer selection, and fast order submission.

• Retail Customers: Direct login to browse the catalog with wholesale pricing, add items to cart, and place their own orders.

• Leverage SparkLayer for core B2B wholesale features:

• Customer registration + manual account approval workflow

• Wholesale-only pricing (completely hidden from public)

• Tiered pricing and volume discounts

• Minimum order quantity (MOQ) enforcement

• Bulk ordering and quick order forms

• Company-specific catalogs and price lists

• Login-protected B2B storefront

• Quote request / RFQ system

• Set up automatic order notifications and export options so our Hawaii production team can receive and process orders efficiently

• Professional, clean, mobile-responsive design optimized for both sales reps and retail buyers

• Fast site performance and basic SEO setup

Must-Have Requirements

• Minimum 3–5 years of strong Shopify development experience

• Proven experience building B2B / Wholesale stores on Shopify with both sales-rep ordering and direct customer login/self-service capabilities

• Must have built at least 2 live B2B wholesale Shopify sites — please share links

• Strong knowledge of Shopify Liquid, customer accounts, metafields, draft orders, and multi-user B2B workflows

• Experience creating role-based access (sales reps vs. direct customers)

• Excellent English communication skills

• Ability to work Monday–Friday 1:00 PM – 6:00 PM HST and collaborate on SparkLayer integration

Nice-to-Have

• Shopify Plus experience

• Previous work in gift/souvenir wholesale or Hawaii-based businesses

• Experience with order exports, tagging, and automated notifications for production facilities

• Familiarity with B2B apps (SparkLayer experience is a plus, but not required)

How to Apply Please
 the following to [your
@yourbusiness.com (mailto:your
@yourbusiness.com)] with the subject line:

“Shopify B2B Souvenir Wholesale Developer – [Your Name]”

1. Portfolio / Resume

2. Links to at least 2 B2B wholesale Shopify stores you have built (highlight any with sales rep + direct customer access)

3. Brief description of how you would approach this dual-access B2B project using SparkLayer (sales reps placing orders + direct customer login)

4. Your availability and estimated timeline to complete the project

Only developers with demonstrated experience in B2B Shopify setups involving both sales team ordering and direct customer self-service will be considered. Generic applications will not receive a reply.

title: Virtual Assistant – Wix Website Designer & Content Creator
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for a skilled and creative Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to help us design, build, and maintain professional websites, primarily using Wix and GHL.



This role will start as project-based gig work with the opportunity to grow into ongoing part-time work as we scale.



Our first project is for a high-end custom home builder, where you will recreate and elevate an existing website into a more modern, clean, and elegant design that reflects a premium brand.



Key Responsibilities

-Design and build websites using Wix (required)

-Recreate and improve existing websites with a more modern, high-end look

-Create quick mockup/demo websites or landing pages for client presentations

-Update and maintain existing websites as needed

-Assist with Go High Level (GHL) website/funnel builds (preferred)

-Create and edit videos and visual content for websites and social media

-Assist with content creation (graphics, layouts, basic branding elements)

-Collaborate with our team to bring ideas and concepts to life



Requirements

-Proven experience with Wix website design and development

-Experience with Go High Level (preferred but not required)

-Strong eye for clean, modern, and high-end design

-Experience with video editing and content creation tools

-Creative mindset with attention to detail

-Strong communication skills (written and verbal)

-Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines

-Ability to work independently and follow direction



Project Scope (First Job)

Rebuild and redesign an existing website for a custom home builder



Focus on:

-Clean, high-end, luxury aesthetic

-Improved layout and user experience

-Strong visual presentation of projects/services

Important (Please Include in Your Application)



To help us understand your skill level, please answer the following:



-How long does it typically take you to build a full website (5–10 pages)?

-How long would it take you to create a quick mockup/demo site or landing page for client approval?



Please share examples of Wix websites you have built



What tools do you use for video editing and content creation?



Compensation

Project-based pay (per website or task)

Opportunity to grow into consistent part-time work

Potential for long-term collaboration as we scale



Why Work With Us?

Ongoing work opportunities as we grow

Clear direction and expectations

Ability to expand your role into website management, marketing, and content creation

Work with a team building real businesses in construction, services, and branding



Final Note

We are looking for someone creative, reliable, and hungry to grow with us long-term. If you take pride in your work and enjoy building clean, professional websites, we want to work with you.

title: Cold Caller / Sales Closer for US Digital Agency (Commission-Based, Part-Time)
description:
Cold Caller / Sales Closer for US Digital Agency (Commission-Based, Part-Time)



**Job Description:**



We don't pay by the hour. We pay by the deal. If you can find leads, close them, and collect payment, your earning potential here is uncapped.



We're a US-based digital agency that builds websites, CRMs, and marketing automation for local service businesses (HVAC, landscaping, construction, law firms, med spas). We need a part-time sales closer with perfect English who can find their own leads, get them on the phone, close the deal, collect payment, and keep clients happy long-term.



**Detailed Responsibilities:**



1. Research and build your own prospect lists of local service businesses in the US using Google, LinkedIn, Google Maps, and other online tools. You find the leads, you own the pipeline.

2. Cold call business owners, run a discovery conversation to understand their pain points, present our services, handle objections, and close the deal on the same call or a scheduled follow-up.

3. Collect payment information from new clients and ensure a smooth handoff to our onboarding team. You stay the point of contact through the first 30 days.

4. Send a daily activity report: calls made, conversations had, appointments set, deals closed, revenue collected.

5. Maintain ongoing contact with existing clients to identify upsell opportunities into higher-tier packages, generating recurring commission for yourself.



**Required Technical Skills and Experience (at least 1 year):**



1. Cold calling and outbound sales to US-based businesses (B2B, not B2C)

2. Full sales cycle experience: prospecting, setting, closing, and collecting payment

3. Lead scraping and list building using Google, LinkedIn, Google Maps, or similar tools



**Soft Skills:**



We need someone who thrives on rejection and keeps dialing. You will go far if you are:



- Relentless and self-motivated. Nobody is going to tell you to pick up the phone.

- A natural conversationalist who sounds like a trusted advisor, not a telemarketer

- Coachable. We have scripts and frameworks, but we want someone who can adapt them to real conversations.

- Honest and straightforward. We do not oversell or mislead business owners.



**Basic Skills:**



You must have near-native or native-level spoken English. US-based business owners will be your only audience, and if your English is not excellent on the phone, this role is not a fit. No exceptions.



You also need to be comfortable with:



- Google Sheets or Excel for tracking your pipeline

- Gmail and Google Calendar

- Communication tools like Slack and Zoom

- CRM software (we will train you on ours)



**Desired Technical Skills and Experience:**



These are not required but will give you priority:



1. Experience selling digital marketing services (websites, SEO, CRM, lead generation)

2. Familiarity with any CRM platform (HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar)

3. Experience with cold
 outreach tools or dialers (like PhoneBurner, Mojo, OpenPhone, etc.)



**Work Schedule:**



This is a part-time position, approximately 20 hours per week. You must be available to make calls during US business hours (8am to 5pm Mountain Time, which is 10pm to 7am Manila Time). You choose which days and how many hours, but calls must happen when US business owners are in their offices.



**Salary:**



This is a 100% commission role. You earn a percentage of every deal you close. Our packages range from $1,500 to $10,000+, so a single close can pay more than most monthly VA salaries. Top performers on our team have earned $1,000 to $3,000+ per month on part-time hours.



**Perks and Benefits:**



- Uncapped commissions. There is no ceiling on what you can earn.

- Recurring commissions on upsells to your existing clients

- Full sales training, call scripts, objection handling frameworks, and recorded examples provided

- You keep your book of clients. The more you build, the more you earn from upsells without making new calls.

- Opportunity to move into a full-time Sales Manager role as we scale



**Training Provided:**



You will receive full training on our services, pricing, CRM system, sales scripts, and objection handling playbook. We also provide recorded examples of successful sales calls so you can hear exactly what works. You do not need to know our industry on day one, but you do need to know how to sell.



**Career Potential:**



This starts as a part-time commission role. Top performers will be offered a base salary plus commission and the opportunity to manage a team of sales reps. Our goal is to build a sales department, and the person who proves themselves first will lead it.



**How to Apply:**



When applying,
 Tanner directly 
 sure to include your name and "I Close Deals" in the subject heading.



In your application, also include:



1. A 2-minute voice recording (use a free account on 
) where you pretend you are calling a landscaping company owner and pitching them on a new website. We do not care if it is perfect. We want to hear your English, your energy, and your ability to think on your feet.

2. A short paragraph explaining the biggest deal you have ever closed (amount, product/service, how you found the lead).

3. A short paragraph about why you are interested in working here at a commission-only position with unlimited growth potential.



Applications without the Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Experienced Real Estate Cold Caller – Full Time (Long Term Only)
description:
Job Description:



We are a fast-growing real estate investment company based in the United States, and we are hiring 5 experienced cold callers to join our team full-time.

This is a long-term position, not a short-term freelance role. We are looking for serious individuals who want stability, growth, and consistent work.

Your role will be to call property owners, have conversations, qualify leads, and pass opportunities to our acquisitions team.



Responsibilities:

Make 300–350 outbound calls per day

Speak with property owners and build rapport

Handle objections confidently

Ask the right questions to identify motivation

Gather key information (condition, timeline, price)

Submit qualified leads with clear notes

Follow scripts and company processes

Stay consistent and professional on every call



Compensation:

$6/hour (full-time)

$100 bonus per deal closed

Weekly team incentives (performance-based rewards)



Requirements:

Minimum 1 year cold calling or phone sales experience

Real estate experience is a BIG plus (wholesaling, ISA, acquisitions, etc.)

Strong English speaking skills (clear and confident)

Comfortable handling objections and rejection

Must be able to make 300+ calls daily

Reliable internet connection

Good quality headset

Quiet working environment

Available to work U.S. hours full-time MONDAY-FRIDAY



KPI Expectations:

300–350 calls per day

3–5 qualified leads per day (depending on data quality)



We Are Looking For:

People who want a long-term home

Hard workers who take feedback and improve

Team players who are coachable

Individuals who take ownership of their role



To Apply:

Please send:

Your resume

A 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself

A short description of your cold calling experience

What dialers/CRMs you’ve used

Your internet speed screenshot



Start your application with the words: READY TO WORK



(Applications that do not follow instructions will NOT be considered)

title: Virtual Airbnb Operations Lead (High Execution | Remote Leadership Role)
description:
About The Role



We are hiring a highly driven Virtual Operations Lead to take ownership of daily execution across our fast-growing co-living and short-term rental business.



This is a senior remote leadership role for someone who has a strong bias for action, exceptional execution skills, and a deep sense of ownership.



You will oversee operations across multiple hosting platforms, lead and motivate remote teams, resolve escalations, and ensure that the business runs smoothly every day.



This role comes with significant decision-making authority and clear long-term growth opportunities.



Work Schedule

Monday to Saturday





8:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST





Sunday off (on call only for very urgent operational issues)







 Compensation

$1,200 USD per month



Perks include additional performance bonus, yearly bonus and annual salary reviews (based on performace and contribution to the team)





Fully remote







? Core Responsibilities

? Multi-Platform Hosting Oversight

Supervise hosting operations across platforms such as Airbnb, Expedia, PadSplit, and other booking channels





Ensure listings are managed properly and operational standards are maintained





Oversee guest experience, occupancy flow, booking extensions, and issue resolution





Monitor platform performance and ensure timely responses to guest and resident concerns







? Team Leadership & Execution

Lead, motivate, and supervise Virtual Assistants and Team Leaders





Drive accountability and ensure tasks are completed to standard





Identify performance gaps and implement improvements





Maintain high team productivity and operational discipline







? Hiring & Team Growth

Participate in recruiting and hiring new Virtual Assistants





Support onboarding and integration of new tea
mbers





Help build a strong and scalable operations team







Operational Decision Making

Resolve escalations involving guests, residents, payments, maintenance, and logistics





Take initiative to solve problems quickly and effectively





Enforce company policies and operational standards





Escalate only major financial or strategic issues







Systems & Process Ownership

Monitor workflows and operational boards (e.g., 
)





Ensure accurate tracking of occupancy, collections, maintenance, and cleaning





Recommend and implement process improvements





Drive efficiency and automation where possible







Financial & Administrative Coordination

Liaise with the company accountant to provide operational clarifications





Assist in resolving payment questions and operational discrepancies





Support accurate reporting and documentation across teams







? What We Are Looking For

We are looking for someone who:

Has strong execution skills and follows through until completion





Has a natural bias for action and does not wait to be chased





Demonstrates a deep sense of ownership and accountability





Is confident managing people and making operational decisions





Thrives in fast-paced environments





Is highly organized and detail-oriented





Communicates clearly and professionally





Is comfortable using technology and managing remote workflows



To apply, please complete the form via this link:







Growth Opportunities

This role is part of our leadership pipeline.

High performers will have opportunities to grow into:



Operations Manager





Regional Operations Leader



Strategy or Executive Leadership roles



You will gain real exposure to scaling systems, managing international teams, and building structured operations.



? How to Apply

Please submit:

Your resume





A short voice introduction





A written example of a time you took ownership of a challenging situation and drove it to completion



Brutally Honest Role Expectations



This is a leadership role in a fast-moving operations environment.



It is not suitable for someone looking for a relaxed or routine virtual job.



? High Execution Environment



This role requires consistent follow-through.



Issues must be driven to completion.

Tasks cannot be left half done.

You will be expected to move work forward every day without waiting to be reminded.



If you prefer to only execute clearly assigned tasks or wait for detailed instructions before acting, this role may not be a good fit.



? Long Operational Hours



The work schedule is demanding:



Monday to Saturday



8 AM to 8 PM EST



This includes periods of high activity, escalations, and decision making.



You must have the stamina, discipline, and focus required to perform at a high level during long working hours.



? Ownership Mindset Required



You will be trusted with significant responsibility.



You are expected to think beyond your task list and consider:



revenue protection



guest experience



team productivity



operational efficiency



If something is not working, you are expected to take initiative and propose or implement solutions.



This role is not suitable for candidates who prefer to avoid responsibility or escalate every challenge.



? Pressure and Accountability



Operational issues can be time-sensitive and sometimes stressful.



You will need to:



make practical decisions with incomplete information



manage competing priorities



remain calm while leading others



Performance will be measured based on outcomes, not effort alone.



? Leadership Expectations



You will supervise Virtual Assistants and Team Leaders.



This means:



giving direction



enforcing standards



addressing underperformance



motivating the team



You must be comfortable holding others accountable.



? Startup Growth Reality



We are a growing company with evolving systems.



Processes will improve over time, but not everything will be perfect from day one.



You must be adaptable and comfortable working in an environment where improvement and execution happen simultaneously.



? Long-Term Opportunity



This role is designed for candidates who want to grow into senior leadership.



If you are looking for stability, influence, and the opportunity to shape operations at scale, this role can be highly rewarding.



If you are looking for minimal responsibility or predictable routine work, this role may not align with your expectations.



To apply, please complete the form via this link:

title: Creator Outreach
description:
Hello, I run an apparel brand and need someone with experience in creator outreach



In the past, people have just picked random creators who don’t fit the brand at all. Which was honestly a big headache. I’m going to give you a very clear image of my ideal customer, and your job is to find creators that resemble that. Creators must also make good videos, creators who do not post often or make poor quality videos should be skipped / ignored.



What you’ll be doing:



-Finding creators that actually fit the brands image 

-Sending orders out to around 15 creators per week

-Making sure they’re genuinely interested in working with us so they do not ghost us

-Advanced Tracking System (costs, performance, etc.) (VERY IMPORTANT)

-Setting up discounts/orders in Shopify so creators can get product

-Tracking if their content actually performs / brings results

-Making sure the creators content is good / product focused. Content should fit well on an ad

-Manage brand account social media



Experience Needed:



-You’ve done creator outreach before

-You can understand what looks good for our brand

-You are detail oriented and care about doing the job correctly

-You’re organized and can track costs /  metrics properly

-You know your way around Shopify



Our goal is to get creators that perfectly fit our brands image and will make good videos that we can then post onto meta ads.



I’m not looking for someone who’s just going to do the bare minimum. I need someone who actually cares and understands how to do this job and pick good creators.



PLEASE SEND PAST WORK / OUTREACH EXPERIENCE.

1. Reasons why you should be considered.

2. Your
 ADDRESS so we can reach out to you.



Thank you for considering this opportunity, and GOOD LUCK!!!



P.S. We’re keeping our company name private to avoid unsolicited inquiries from unqualified applicants.

title: Video Editor
description:
Who We Are



Clear Sky Creations is a California-based video production company that creates high-quality brand stories, social-first content, and impactful visuals that resonate. We partner with brands to bring out their voice through emotional storytelling, creative polish, and fast-paced delivery.



Check out our reel:





Who We’re Looking For

We’re hiring one to two Video Editors who know how to go beyond just cutting clips. We're looking for editors who:



Have an intuitive eye for the right shot and pacing

Can pull emotion from interviews and footage

Are masters of the soundbite, music, and motion graphics that elevate a story

Work quickly and efficiently with tight turnarounds

Stay on top of social media trends and formats

You’ll work closely with our editing team—trading off quality control and complementing each other’s strengths. This is a collaborative role, and the ability to work within a team structure is a must.



This is a full-time remote position, working 9:00AM to 5:00PM Pacific Time. You must have very fast internet speeds for uploading/downloading large video files.



This is a great opportunity for a passionate video editor who wants to level up their portfolio with exciting, brand-driven work across platforms.



We’re not looking for cookie-cutter, template-style edits.

We want standout creatives—people who can wow us with:



A compelling brand story or interview edit, or

Motion graphic-driven pieces that get your heart rate pumping



Responsibilities

- Video Editing & Assembly: Build emotionally impactful videos from interviews, b-roll, and social content.

- Sound & Music Selection: Choose powerful soundbites, SFX, and music to elevate the storytelling.

- Color Grading & Visual Polish: Maintain brand tone and visual consistency across all projects.

- Motion Graphics: Add custom animations and movement to support messaging and keep content dynamic.

- Collaborative Quality Control: Work in tandem with a fellow editor to review, refine, and push quality.

- Trend Awareness: Stay on top of current editing styles and social-first video formats.

- Organization & File Management: Use tools like 
 and Google Drive to track work and manage files.

- Meet Deadlines: Deliver high-quality edits quickly and reliably under pressure.



Qualifications

- Software Proficiency: Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Audition (bonus if you're also strong in DaVinci or other tools).

- Portfolio with Edge: We want to see edits that tell a story and show creative intent—not just polished transitions.

- Fast Internet: Must be able to quickly transfer large files with minimal downtime.

- Time-Zone Alignment: You’ll work 9am–5pm PT with U.S.-based teams.

- Organized & Communicative: You follow process, stay organized, and communicate clearly within a team.

- Self-Motivated: You take initiative, respond to feedback, and always look for ways to improve.



Why Join Clear Sky Creations

- Creative Growth: Work on compelling brand stories and projects that challenge you creatively.

- Supportive Team Culture: We value collaboration, feedback, and making each other better.

- Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere (as long as you’ve got the speed and focus).

- Project Variety: From emotional interviews to slick social edits—your creativity won’t be boxed in.



Details

Employment Type: Full-Time, Remote

Schedule: 9AM–6PM Pacific Time, Monday to Friday

Salary Range: $600-$1200/month (DOE)

Client Base: Primarily U.S.-based brands and agencies



Apply here:

title: L2 Tech Support Engineer
description:
Dear Technology Lover!

We're a small (but VERY efficient) 20-year-old MSP based in Arizona.

As a small company. we're VERY employee-focused, and believe that our tea
mbers are our MOST IMPORTANT ASSET!



Here are some of the things you can expect from working with us:

• Ongoing (monthly) manager review and feedback- you should never guess where you are "standing" and what you, AND THE COMPANY, can do better!

• Paid certifications- we will pay for your courses, and tests and allocate time during business hours to help you achieve your desired goals

• Paid Time Off- it's important to us that you are happy, healthy, and have a work-life balance!

• Bonuses- when the company wins- you win!

• Raises- As we grow, we believe you should as well. We have to stay competitive as an employer to retain our awesome employees!

• Opportunities to grow- In our industry, we can't be on "cruise control"... We need to push our tea
mbers to stay ahead of the technology curve. Help you continually to sharpen your skills with a focus on your career aspirations.

• Paid sick days- We understand life happens. We don't want you to feel that you have to drag yourself to work sick if your body tells you to relax...



You're the right fit if you:

• LOVE learning, working with, and experimenting with new technology

• Get excited when you save someone's day and provide great service

• Are a hard-working fun person, and see yourself being in the IT industry for the foreseeable future

• Want to work in a GROWING environment, with STABLE income, Bonuses, and a great attitude!

• Want the opportunity to advance and learn more!



Some of the responsibilities that your position will include are:

Helpdesk (mostly escalations, but some basic if needed), cyber security related tasks/ audits, cloud hosting and virtualization (HyperV, SonicWall, VPN), MS365 management and automation, BCDR (Axcient), networking (Unifi, Sonicwall), IT projects, Servers maintenance (Windows only), scripts creation, testing new technology and other tasks related to IT.



IMPORTANT:

This position requires AT LEAST 2 years of MSP experience and at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory, or lead role. 100% clean background check, highly organized, technologically savvy, and can work diligently with little 
veral hiring steps will take place to verify the above requirements, including reference checking, employment verification, technical testing, and more.



Minimum technical level that you will need to be able to pass a test on:

• Explaining to a non-technical person what the "cloud" is

• Consulting with a new client on what BCDR solution you would recommend to an SMB, and why

• Explaining what the differences are between traditional anti-virus and XDR

• Creating a new Virtual Machine on Hyper-V host, from an ISO file located on a different computer on the network.

• Explaining the differences and commonalities between SharePoint and OneDrive.

• Creating an Intune policy that will install Firefox on an Azure-joined VM, and make Firefox the default browser, with the specific home page we'll provide to you during the test.

• Several other situational and technical questions.

• CCNA certificate candidates preferred but not required.



MORE DETAILS:

• A PRE-EMPLOYMENT BACKGROUND CHECK is performed (at our expense). You must have 100% clean background check. Please do not apply if you don't have 100% clean background check.

• Personality is KEY for us. We are looking for an easy-going, yet professional, friendly and HONEST person.

• You will be working from home. This means you must have a quiet work environment and no excessive background noise.

• FAST AND RELIABLE INTERNET SERVICE IS REQUIRED With at least 100Mbps download speed  20+Mbps upload speed.

• As part of this position requirement, you must have a computer that will be used exclusively for your work with us. This means we will be installing our security software on that computer, will remove admin rights from you, and monitor/ control it for security and compliance reasons. In return, we will pay you additional “rent” fees, on top of your salary, in the amount of several hundred dollars. Details about this “rental” will be discussed during your second interview. There are minimum requirements that your computer must have, in order to be employed with us. You must have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 minimum 9th gen processor (preferably a newer one) with 16 GB RAM or more or Ryzen 5/7 (MUST include TPM support) as well as Windows 11 OS.

• You must have recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more.

• We evaluate/ review employees monthly and provide consistent feedback.

• We offer raises and bonuses according to performance, certifications, attitude, and customer reviews twice/ year.

• Your manager (our IT director) will create a roadmap for your "KPIs" and certifications track. We always push our team to earn certifications and additional knowledge – even allowing “disconnect study time” during business hours!

• On-call rotation (after-hours) for a week at a time, once every 4-5 weeks. It's VERY rare that we get calls after-hours (the average is only twice/ year!).

• We're closed on major US holidays, and at the completion of the first 3 months of employment, you'll qualify for paid holidays.

• Work hours are Mon-Fri at 8 am till 5:30 pm (UTC-07:00 , MST, Arizona time zone)

• Every 4 to 5 weeks, you'll be working 1/2 day on a Saturday (project work/catch-up work) and get 1/2 day off the week after

• Mandatory 1-hour lunch and additional breaks (as you need those) throughout the day.

• Further details and information will be discussed with qualified candidates.



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED:

• REQUIRED: Relevant minimum 2 YEARS experience working for an MSP

• REQUIRED: With AT LEAST 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role.

• REQUIRED: Microsoft Azure AD/ M365 experience

• REQUIRED: Experience working with an RMM and PSA software (DATTO preferred)

• Preferred: Cyber Security education/experience

• Preferred: Hyper-V experience



Other tools we use:

Barracuda DNS filter, AutoElevate, Cylance, Infocyte, Syxsense, IT Glue, SonicWall, Unifi, and more



HOW TO APPLY?



Answer the questions below, or you may also send an
 to 
 with the subject line "L2 Tech Support - Feb2026" with your answers:



- An attachment of your resume in PDF format/ link of you resume if you will send us a message.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you have a 100% clean background with no criminal history.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you understand the business hours (MST\ Arizona time zone.



Answer the following questions:

1. How many years of experience do you have working in an MSP company? Name of the MSP company/s you worked with.

2. Do you have at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role?

3. Do you have experience working with RMM and PSA software? What applications did you use?

4. Do you have experience working with Virtualization, servers, GPO, TCP/IP, hyper-v/vmware, conditional access, Intune, and Scripting such as PowerShell?

5. Have you recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more? What time zone and when?

6. Are you okay with the computer requirements and the rental arrangement described in the job details?

7. Do you have an internet speed of at least 100Mbps download speed and  20+ upload speed?



We're looking forward to having you join our family!

title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
We’re searching for a 40 hours a week Video Editor who loves telling stories through video and thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative environment. If you’re passionate about content, reliable, detail-oriented, and eager to grow alongside a purpose-driven creative team, this is for you.



Hours: Monday–Friday, 9am–6pm PT (occasional weekend/holiday needs possible).



Type: 40 hours a week Independent Contractor Retainer.



Responsibilities



- Edit and deliver high-quality video content for social media and client communications.

- Organize and manage footage/assets.

- Create simple animated graphics and clean social thumbnails.

- Stay on top of social trends and best practices.

- Collaborate with creative leads and communicate proactively.

- Implement feedback with a positive, solutions-focused attitude.



Experience



- 1+ year of video editing experience (professional or freelance)

- Portfolio demonstrating social media edits

- Familiarity with Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and LinkedIn formats

- Experience with Adobe Suite, Final Cut, or equivalent

- Basic motion graphics/thumbnail skills

- Bonus: Experience with brand storytelling or agency work



How We Will Help You Succeed



- Supportive creative team and transparent leadership

- Access to trend research, tools, and training resources

- Regular feedback and growth opportunities

- Clear, values-driven expectations and support



Please fill out the form below: (If you do not fill out the form below, you will not be considered)

title: Experienced Real Estate Cold Caller – Full Time (Long Term Only)
description:
Job Description:



We are a fast-growing real estate investment company based in the United States, and we are hiring 5 experienced cold callers to join our team full-time.

This is a long-term position, not a short-term freelance role. We are looking for serious individuals who want stability, growth, and consistent work.

Your role will be to call property owners, have conversations, qualify leads, and pass opportunities to our acquisitions team.



Responsibilities:

Make 300–350 outbound calls per day

Speak with property owners and build rapport

Handle objections confidently

Ask the right questions to identify motivation

Gather key information (condition, timeline, price)

Submit qualified leads with clear notes

Follow scripts and company processes

Stay consistent and professional on every call



Compensation:

$6/hour (full-time)

$100 bonus per deal closed

Weekly team incentives (performance-based rewards)



Requirements:

Minimum 1 year cold calling or phone sales experience

Real estate experience is a BIG plus (wholesaling, ISA, acquisitions, etc.)

Strong English speaking skills (clear and confident)

Comfortable handling objections and rejection

Must be able to make 300+ calls daily

Reliable internet connection

Good quality headset

Quiet working environment

Available to work U.S. hours full-time MONDAY-FRIDAY



KPI Expectations:

300–350 calls per day

3–5 qualified leads per day (depending on data quality)



We Are Looking For:

People who want a long-term home

Hard workers who take feedback and improve

Team players who are coachable

Individuals who take ownership of their role



To Apply:

Please send:

Your resume

A 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself

A short description of your cold calling experience

What dialers/CRMs you’ve used

Your internet speed screenshot



Start your application with the words: READY TO WORK



(Applications that do not follow instructions will NOT be considered)

title: Appointment Setter
description:
We are seeking a high-energy, disciplined, and tech-savvy Appointment Setter to join our elite real estate team. This isn't just about making "cold calls"—it’s about managing a sophisticated multi-channel prospecting system to identify motivated sellers and high-intent leads. You will be the first point of contact, responsible for converting database leads into "Strategic Market Audit" appointments for our senior agents.



Key Responsibilities

Lead Management: Execute a high-volume "Triple Threat" sequence involving ringless voi
s, SMS, and
, followed by strategic outbound calls.



Database Mastery: Manage and update leads within Follow Up Boss, ensuring all data is accurately tagged and followed up on based on the lead's timeline.



Conversion: Identify the needs of sellers (specifically those with expired listings) and explain the value of our Hybrid Sales Program (Cash Offer vs. Market Value).



Setting Appointments: Schedule high-quality listing appointments, ensuring the seller is fully qualified and motivated.



Consistency: Maintain a rigorous daily dialing schedule to hit specific KPIs for contact rates and appointments set.



Required Qualifications

Proven Track Record: At least 1–2 years of experience in outbound sales, telemarketing, or appointment setting (Real Estate experience preferred).



Tech Proficiency: Comfortable using CRM systems (Follow Up Boss), dialing software, and Google Workspace.



Strong Communication: An "elevated" phone presence—professional, persuasive, and empathetic without being "salesy."



Resilience: The ability to handle high-volume prospecting and overcome objections with ease.



Organization: Meticulous attention to detail regarding lead notes and follow-up schedules.



What We Offer

Competitive Compensation: Base pay plus a performance-based bonus structure for every kept appointment and closed deal.



Elite Systems: Access to premium lead sources (Espresso Agent) and a massive database of over 10,000 leads.



Growth Potential: Opportunities to move into senior sales roles or brokerage management.



Professional Culture: Work within a high-producing, multi-million dollar real estate environment.

title: Director of Recruiting & Hiring for US Digital Agency (Part-Time to Full-Time, $6-$8/hr)
description:
We're looking for someone who loves finding great people and knows how to build a hiring machine from scratch. You'll own the entire recruiting and hiring process for our agency and eventually for our clients too. This role starts part-time (20 hrs/wk) and grows to full-time as you prove yourself. If you're the kind of person who gets excited about building talent pipelines, screening candidates, and turning hiring into a repeatable system, this is your role.



---



**Background:**

Web Launch Pros is a US-based digital agency that builds websites, CRMs, and marketing automation for local service businesses (HVAC, landscaping, construction, law firms, med spas). We have a small but growing remote team across the Philippines and the US. We are scaling fast and need someone who can keep up with hiring demand across multiple roles and verticals. You will work directly with the founder and report into leadership.



---



**Detailed Responsibilities:**



1. Own the full recruiting cycle for all open roles: write and post job listings on OnlineJobs.ph, Indeed, and other platforms. Screen applications, manage candidate pipelines, and move qualified candidates through each stage of our automated hiring funnel (application form, English proficiency test, AI-powered interview, skills assessment). You are responsible for keeping the pipeline full and moving.



2. Build and maintain candidate screening systems. We use an automated multi-step funnel that includes application scoring, English testing, AI avatar interviews, and skills assessments. You will manage, monitor, and improve this funnel. When something breaks or a stage has low pass-through rates, you diagnose and fix it. You will track funnel metrics the same way a marketing team tracks lead conversion.



3. Source and recruit candidates proactively. Do not wait for applications to come in. Search candidate databases on OnlineJobs.ph, LinkedIn, and other sourcing channels. Reach out to strong candidates directly. Build a bench of pre-qualified talent for roles we hire repeatedly (virtual assistants, CRM builders, sales reps). Maintain a talent database in Notion.



4. Manage onboarding logistics for new hires. Coordinate account setup, tool access, contractor agreements, first-week schedules, and SOP assignments. Ensure every new hire has a smooth first week with clear expectations and the resources they need to succeed. Hand off to the appropriate team lead once onboarding is complete.



5. Recruit for client projects as the agency grows. As we expand, you will also source and hire contract talent on behalf of our clients (sales reps, appointment setters, admin VAs). You will manage these candidate pipelines separately and ensure client-facing hires meet our quality bar.



---



**Required Technical Skills and Experience:**



- At least 2 years of experience in recruiting, talent acquisition, or HR operations. You must have hands-on experience writing job descriptions, screening resumes, conducting interviews, and managing candidate pipelines. Agency or BPO recruiting experience is a strong advantage.

- Experience using OnlineJobs.ph as a recruiter or hiring manager. You understand how the platform works, how to search the candidate database, how to write listings that attract quality applicants, and how to filter efficiently.

- Proficiency with project management and database tools (Notion preferred). You will maintain candidate tracking databases, build hiring dashboards, and manage task lists for each open role. If you have not used Notion, you must be a fast learner with similar tools (Airtable, ClickUp, Trello).



---



**Soft Skills:**



- Relentlessly organized. You manage multiple open roles at once without dropping candidates or missing follow-ups.

- Strong written English. Every job listing, outreach message, and candidate communication you write reflects well on the company.

- Self-starter who does not wait for instructions. You see a gap in the pipeline and fill it before being asked.

- Data-driven. You track metrics, spot bottlenecks, and make decisions based on numbers, not gut feelings.

- High judgment on people. You can quickly assess whether a candidate is worth advancing or not, and you are comfortable making that call.



---



**Basic Skills:**



- Excellent written English (you will write job postings, outreach messages, and candidate evaluations daily)

- Conversational spoken English (you will coordinate with US-based leadership on Slack and Zoom)

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- Slack for daily communication

- Zoom for meetings and candidate coordination

- Comfortable learning new tools quickly (our CRM platform, AI screening tools, form builders)



---



**Desired Technical Skills and Experience:**



- Experience with applicant tracking systems (ATS) or building hiring funnels with automation tools

- Familiarity with HeyGen, Loom, or other video-based screening/interview tools

- Experience recruiting sales representatives or cold callers specifically (understanding what makes a good phone-based hire)



---



**Work Schedule and Holidays:**



- Starts at 20 hours per week (part-time), with a clear path to 40 hours per week (full-time) based on performance and hiring volume

- Schedule aligned with US Mountain Time business hours (flexible on exact hours within that window)

- Manila Time equivalent: evenings/nights PHT (approximately 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM PHT depending on schedule chosen)

- Probationary period: 6 months

- After probation: 3 vacation days + 3 sick days per year

- Holidays observed: most Filipino holidays except All Saints Day and All Souls Day



---



**Salary:**



$6 - $8 per hour USD depending on experience. At 20 hours per week, this is approximately $480 - $640 per month. At full-time (40 hrs/wk), this is approximately $960 - $1,280 per month.



---



**Perks and Benefits:**



- 13th month pay after probationary period

- Cash equivalent for unused leave days

- Performance bonuses tied to hiring speed and quality metrics

- Access to premium recruiting tools and AI screening technology paid for by the company



---



**Training Provided:**



- Full training on our hiring funnel, screening systems, and candidate evaluation rubrics

- Training on our CRM platform and internal tools

- SOPs for every stage of the recruiting process

- Direct mentorship from the founder during onboarding



---



**Career Potential:**



This role has a clear growth path. You start part-time managing internal hiring. As you prove yourself, the role grows to full-time and expands to include client recruiting. Long-term, you could lead an entire recruiting division that serves both our agency and our clients. Top performers receive raises every 6 months based on measurable results. If you want to build something, not just fill a seat, this is the role for you.



---



**How to Apply:**



Do NOT use the OnlineJobs.ph apply button.



Instead, send an
 to 
 with the following:



1. Subject line must include the words "I Find Talent" (applications without this exact phrase will not be reviewed)



2. Attach your resume



3. In the body of your
, answer these two questions:

   - What is your experience recruiting on OnlineJobs.ph specifically? How many hires have you made through the platform?

   - Describe one time you improved a hiring process or solved a recruiting bottleneck. What was the problem, what did you do, and what was the result?



4. Include a 2-minute Loom video (or similar screen recording) where you walk through how you would search for and evaluate a "GHL Technical Builder" candidate on OnlineJobs.ph. Show your screen, explain your search strategy, and talk through how you would d
 which candidates to shortlist.



Applications missing the Loom video or the subject line phrase will not be reviewed. We respond to all qualified applicants within 5 business days.

title: Senior Full-Stack TypeScript Developer (CRM System)
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Full-Stack TypeScript Developer to take ownership of a production-grade, custom-built CRM platform used in the mortgage industry.



This is a high-complexity system with multiple portals, deep backend architecture, and strict compliance/security requirements. The ideal candidate will manage, maintain, and improve the system, working alongside the current US-based developer for onboarding.



This is not a junior or mid-level role — seniority is critical due to the system’s complexity and risk exposure. 

 

System Overview

• 3 Core Portals: 

o Client Portal 

o Employee/Staff Portal 

o Referral/Partner Portal 

• Additional: Public lead funnel 

• Tech Stack: 

o Frontend: Next.js 15 / React 18 

o Backend: NestJS (TypeScript) 

o Database: PostgreSQL / Supabase (with RLS) 

o Queue System: BullMQ / Redis 

• Scale: 350K+ lines of code (enterprise-level system) 

• Integrations: SendGrid, Twilio, Gmail, Google Calendar, RingCentral, AWS Bedrock, etc. 

 

Key Responsibilities

• Maintain and manage the full CRM system across all portals 

• Take ownership of an existing large codebase (not greenfield) 

• Troubleshoot bugs and ensure system stability 

• Implement new features and enhancements 

• Manage and update third-party integrations 

• Handle database migrations and ensure data security 

• Monitor background jobs (BullMQ) and system performance 

• Work within existing architecture (no unnecessary rewrites) 

 

Non-Negotiable Requirements

• Senior-level experience (MUST) – no junior or mid-level candidates 

• Strong TypeScript (strict mode) experience 

• Proven experience with NestJS (not just Node/Express) 

• Experience with Next.js (App Router, SSR) 

• Strong PostgreSQL + Supabase (especially Row-Level Security / RLS) 

• Experience managing large, existing production codebases 

• Familiarity with BullMQ / Redis job queues 

• Experience with API integrations 
, SMS, CRM tools, etc.) 

• Strong understanding of system architecture and security best practices 

• Ability to communicate clearly and work autonomously 

 

Ideal Candidate Profile

• Has taken over and maintained a large, complex system built by others 

• Understands risk in modifying security layers (especially RLS) 

• Strong problem solver with production-level debugging experience 

• Comfortable working in async / remote environments 

• Uses AI tools effectively in development workflows (preferred) 



How to apply:

Please send your

1. Updated resume

2. Portfolio

3. Introduction video about your relevant work experiences

4. A short cover letter why you're the best fit for the role.

title: Assistant Property Manager
description:
Assistant Property Manager



Job Type: Full-Time 

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Pacific Time, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1000 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Assistant Property Manager to support the daily operations of a residential property portfolio. This remote role is responsible for assisting with maintenance coordination, tenant communication, and work order management to help ensure properties are well maintained and residents receive timely and professional service. The ideal candidate is organized, responsive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced property management environment while collaborating remotely with the management team.



Key Responsibilities:

Respond promptly and professionally to tenant inquiries and maintenance requests, ensuring timely follow-up and resolution.

Review, prioritize, and manage maintenance work orders in AppFolio.

Coordinate maintenance services using approved vendors and internal technicians.

Communicate with tenants to schedule maintenance work and provide updates on service requests, documenting communications in AppFolio.

Track maintenance requests to ensure repairs are completed accurately and on time.

Assist the property management team in obtaining repair estimates and coordinating vendor services when necessary.

Maintain accurate records, notes, and updates related to maintenance requests and tenant communications within AppFolio.

Support daily tenant correspondence and help ensure a high level of tenant satisfaction.

Assist with urgent maintenance coordination when necessary.



Required Skills & Qualifications:

Experience using property management software; AppFolio experience strongly preferred.

Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

Ability to prioritize tasks and manage time effectively in a remote work environment.

Strong problem-solving skills and sound judgment when handling maintenance or tenant concerns.

Professional written communication skills with the ability to manage tenant communications effectively.

Self-motivated, reliable, and able to remain composed in high-pressure situations.

Ability to coordinate multiple maintenance requests and follow through to completion.

Availability to assist with urgent maintenance coordination when required.





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: B2B Cold Caller — U.S. Transportation & DOT Compliance | Growth Role | Long-Term
description:
Who We Are:



U.S.-based DOT drug testing and compliance company serving the transportation, logistics, and safety-sensitive industries nationwide. We help trucking companies stay federally compliant through drug testing programs, random testing consortiums, and compliance management, and we are growing fast. We are building our sales team and looking for one sharp, driven cold caller who wants to grow with us long-term.



The Role:

You will be the first voice that trucking companies will hear from, offering OmniLab services. Your job is to call fleet managers, owner-operators, and transportation business owners across the U.S., qualify them, and book appointments for our team to close, or close smaller accounts yourself.



This is not a script-reading job. We want someone who thinks, adapts, and takes ownership of results.

Your Schedule:



- 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM U.S. (PST), (CT) (MT)

- 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM U.S. (PST), (CT) (MT)

- Monday through Friday (4 hours/day, 20 hours/week)



What You Will Do



- Make 80–120 or more outbound calls per day to U.S. trucking and logistics companies

- Qualify prospects by fleet size, compliance status, and current drug testing provider

- Book discovery calls and appointments with decision-makers

- Close smaller accounts directly when appropriate

- Source your own leads using the FMCSA database, Google, LinkedIn, and directories

- Log all activity in our CRM daily

- Suggest improvements to scripts and outreach strategy



What We Are Looking For



- Minimum 1–2 years of B2B cold calling experience — transportation, logistics, or compliance industry experience is a  

  major plus

- Confident, clear English communication — you will speak directly with U.S. business owners

- Self-starter who can generate leads independently, not just work a list

- Goal-oriented — you measure your own success by appointments booked and deals closed

- Reliable internet, computer, and quality headset

- Available to work U.S. Central Time hours as listed above



What We Offer



- $4.00–$7.00/hour based on experience

- Bi-weekly pay | Net 14 | Timesheet submitted every Friday

- Full training on DOT compliance and our services

- Cold call scripts, lead lists, and CRM access provided

- Performance bonuses after your first 5 booked and closed sales

- Real long-term growth — top performers get increased hours, higher pay, and expanded responsibilities as we scale

- A small, fast-moving team where your work directly impacts company growth



To Apply:

Please send the following:



A brief introduction — who you are and why this role fits you

Your B2B cold calling experience — industries, call volume per day, and results

A 60–90 second voice recording introducing yourself as if you are calling a trucking company for the first time



Applications without a voice recording will not be considered. We are hiring immediately.

title: Local SEO & Citation Specialist (Google Business + Lead Gen Websites)
description:
Job Description:



We are looking for an experienced SEO specialist to help grow and rank local service websites in the United States.



Our focus is on local SEO, including:



Google Business Profile optimization

Citation building (VERY IMPORTANT)

City/service page SEO

On-page SEO and internal linking



We build and rank websites, then lease the leads to local businesses.



???? Your Main Responsibilities:



1. Citation Building (TOP PRIORITY)

Create and manage business listings across directories

Ensure consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number)

Submit to high-quality directories (not spam)



Examples include:



Yelp

YellowPages

Bing Places

Apple Maps

Local Chamber of Commerce sites



2. Google Business Profile Optimization

Add and update service areas

Optimize categories and descriptions

Post updates weekly

Help improve rankings in map pack



3. On-Page SEO

Optimize titles, H1, H2, meta descriptions

Add internal links between city pages

Ensure keyword placement is natural



4. Content Support

Help create or optimize SEO content

Focus on local keywords (city + service)



? REQUIREMENTS (IMPORTANT — DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DON’T MEET THESE)

Experience with local SEO

Experience building citations manually (no spam tools)

Understanding of NAP consistency

Familiar with tools like:

Google Search Console

Google Analytics

Ahrefs or SEMrush







Please answer ALL of the following:



1. Show proof of your work

Websites you have ranked

Keywords + rankings (with proof if possible)

2. Citation Experience

List 10 websites where you have built citations

Explain your process step-by-step

3. NAP Consistency

What is NAP and why is it important?

4. Google Business Profile Strategy

How would you rank a local business in Google Maps?





What is your favorite pet?

title: Systems & Automation Specialist (Remote)
description:
Overview



We’re looking for an experienced systems-focused specialist to support the development, optimisation, and maintenance of our internal workflows and automation infrastructure.



This role sits at the intersection of operations and technology. Ideal for someone who enjoys building efficient systems, connecting tools, and improving how a business runs behind the scenes.



You’ll play a key role in ensuring that processes across client delivery, internal coordination, and data management are structured, scalable, and reliable.





Application Process



To be considered, please complete the application form below:



Applications submitted through this platform will not be reviewed.



Key Responsibilities



*Design, build, and optimise internal workflows across multiple business functions

*Implement and manage automations between platforms (e.g. CRM, scheduling, reporting tools)

*Maintain and improve systems used for client onboarding, service delivery, and tracking

*Troubleshoot issues and ensure tools and integrations run smoothly

*Support the structure and organisation of operational data and dashboards

*Collaborate with leadership to identify inefficiencies and implement solutions

*Document processes and maintain clear system logic for internal use



Tools & Platforms



Experience with (or similar to):



*GoHighLevel (or other CRM platforms)

*Automation tools (e.g. Make, Zapier)

*Project management tools (e.g. 
 or equivalent)

*Google Workspace (Sheets, Drive, Docs)





Requirements



*Proven experience working with business systems, automation, or operations infrastructure

*Strong problem-solving ability and logical thinking

*Comfortable working independently and managing priorities

*High attention to detail and process accuracy

*Ability to quickly understand and improve existing workflows





Nice to Have



*Experience in digital agencies or service-based businesses

*Exposure to call centre or service delivery workflows

*Background in process optimisation or systems design





What We Offer



*$1,000–$1,500/month (depending on experience)

*Fully remote, full-time role

*Opportunity to take ownership of systems and processes

*Direct collaboration with a fast-moving team

*Scope to grow into a senior or specialised position



If you have a strong interest in systems, automation, and improving how businesses operate, we’d like to hear from you.

title: Senior-Level Graphic Designer
description:
We Are Hiring: Senior-Level Graphic Designer



We are on the lookout for a highly skilled and experienced senior-level graphic designer to join our team on a long-term, ongoing, month-to-month basis. This is a role for a seasoned professional who can bring technical expertise, creative problem-solving, and a meticulous eye for detail to every project.



What We’re Looking For

We need a designer who:

- Has strong technical design skills and a keen eye for detail.

- Can self-manage projects and timelines to ensure on-time delivery without constant oversight.

- Excels at following directions and adhering to project guidelines.



Required Skills

To excel in this role, you must have:

- Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (InDesign, Illustrator, and Photoshop).

- Prepress knowledge and experience, including converting colors for print and file packaging.

- The ability to correct minor errors, such as inconsistent capitalization in client-delivered content.

- Exceptional attention to detail and the ability to follow directions precisely.

- A creative approach to problem-solving.

- Strong typography skills (e.g., fixing rags and kerning appropriately).

- Real-world client experience.

- The ability to recognize your limits and know when to push them.



Bonus Skills

If you have any of the following, you’ll stand out even more:

- WordPress expertise (especially with DIVI).

- Content writing capabilities.

- Illustration skills.



Typical Projects

Here’s a glimpse of the types of projects you’ll work on:

- Creating website mockups in Photoshop.

- Laying out print brochures.

- Updating or designing print ads.

- Developing brand designs.

- Crafting multipage brochures for companies.



How We Work

- We use Trello to manage projects.

- Projects are typically assigned during the first half of the week.

- Questions about a project should be asked within a day or two of assignment.

- Working files must always be stored on our cloud drive.

- Project time is tracked using our time-tracking software.

- You’ll be provided with brand assets, working files, and access to stock images and graphics as needed.



Compensation

- This position pays $15 USD per hour.



---



How to Apply

To be considered, you must follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not meet these requirements will not be reviewed.



Please provide:

1. A portfolio with at least 10 work samples. (If you only send 10 samples, prioritize longer-form design content such as reports, full ad campaigns, and white papers. Limit logos/brand designs to no more than two, and no more than two should be social media-related.)

2. Your Resume/CV.

3. A written explanation of what uniquely qualifies you for this position.

4. A response to the following: Are there any skills listed under “Required Skills” that you do not have? If so, explain why you feel you should still be considered.

5. A response to the following: Do you have any of the “Bonus Skills”? If yes, explain. If you have additional skills, let us know!

6. Confirmation of whether you consider yourself detail-oriented and able to follow directions precisely.

7. Your availability for a video interview in the next week (include days and times in EST).

8. Your availability to work (hours per week).

title: TikTok Shop Manager / TikTok E-commerce Growth Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced TikTok Shop Manager to help develop and grow our TikTok Shop business in the UK.



We operate multiple product categories and brand shops, and we now need someone who understands how to set up, manage and grow TikTok Shop properly.



This is a hands-on role for someone who already has real experience with TikTok Shop operations, creator outreach, affiliate management, product listing, and paid campaign support.



Main objectives of the role:



1. List products accurately into the correct TikTok brand shops

2. Create and manage company posts/content for the TikTok accounts

3. Identify, recruit and manage affiliates

4. Identify, recruit and manage creators for product promotion

5. Help launch and manage GMV Max campaigns to improve product visibility and sales

6. Support overall growth of the TikTok Shop accounts



Key responsibilities:



1. Upload and optimise product listings in TikTok Shop

2. Organise products correctly across different shops/brands

Improve titles, descriptions, images and product content for conversion

3. Create posting plans for the company TikTok accounts

4. Publish basic promotional and brand content

5. Research and approach suitable affiliates

6. Research and approach suitable creators/influencers

7. Manage outreach messages, follow-ups and relationship building

8. Coordinate samples and track creator/affiliate activity

9. Monitor creator performance and affiliate sales results

10. Assist with setting up and monitoring GMV Max campaigns

11. Help improve shop performance, traffic, conversions and sales

12. Provide regular updates, reporting and recommendations



Requirements:



 - Proven experience managing TikTok Shop

 - Experience listing products and managing shop operations

 - Experience working with affiliates and creators

 - Good understanding of GMV Max and TikTok Shop growth tools

 - Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

 - Good written English

 - Able to work independently and take ownership

 - Experience in e-commerce is essential

 - Experience with UK market brands/products is preferred



Ideal candidate:



 - Has already worked on live TikTok Shop accounts

 - Understands how to drive visibility and sales, not just upload products

 - Can find the right creators and affiliates and actually get activity moving

 - Is proactive, commercial and results-focused

 - Can show examples of previous TikTok Shop work and results



When applying, please answer the following:



1. What TikTok Shop accounts or brands have you worked on?

2. What exactly did you do for those accounts?

3. Have you listed products into TikTok Shop yourself?

4. What experience do you have with affiliates?

5. What experience do you have with creators/influencers?

6. Have you used GMV Max before? Please explain.

7. What results have you achieved?

8. How would you help grow a new or underdeveloped TikTok Shop account?

9. Have you worked with multiple shops or multiple brands?

10. Please send examples, screenshots or case studies of your past work.



Please also include:



Your availability per week

The word TIKTOK GROWTH at the top of your application so we know you have read this properly

title: Sales Support Specialist (100% remote US)
description:
Position Summary

We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Sales Support Specialist to join our team. Qualifications

Strong organizational skills and a keen eye for detail.

Ability to work independently while effectively prioritizing tasks.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.



Work Requirements

Benefits

Opportunity to contribute to a growing company and be part of a dynamic, forward-thinking team.

If you are passionate about supporting sales operations and eager to be part of a thriving company, we encourage you to apply today!

title: Senior Video Animator
description:
We're looking for a world-class Senior Video Animator to create unique and effective social media clips for companies from their podcast episodes, as well as long-from video podcasts, and YouTube-style educational videos.



Hatch is a video-first content agency. We help B2B companies create video podcasts, YouTube video series, and short-form video clips for social media. Our goal is to be the #1 agency in the world helping companies use video-first content to win. 



*Role Overview:



- Full-time, 40-hour per week position.

- Work from home - 9am to 5pm (your local time-zone).

- Enhance your skills through ongoing training and development.



*What You'll Do:



- Create animated YouTube videos to meet Hatch's and clients' standards.  

- Produce short-form videos for LinkedIn, TikTok, IG, and YouTube, following style guides and quality standards.  

- Maintain organized systems: file naming, folder uploads, and project updates.  

- Participate in team calls and communicate via Trello and Slack.  

- Stay updated on video/podcasting trends to innovate and test new styles.  



*Requirements:



- 5+ years with animation and video editing, and 2+ years creating captions in English.

- Experience in color grading footage, a good understanding in audio mixing, and basic typography and design skills.

- Expert at Adobe After Effects, and with skills in Adobe Premiere Pro.

- Strong English communication skills.

- Attention to detail and ability to follow instructions.



*Nice-to-Have:



- Experience with Adobe graphic editing tools (Photoshop, InDesign, Illustrator).

- Familiarity with collaboration tools and AI video tools.



*Benefits

- Work remotely from anywhere in Latin America and the Philippines

- Emphasis on work/life balance

- Paid time-off and holidays

- Opportunities for real growth and career development

title: Inside Sales Associate / Administrative Assistant
description:
Job Title: Inside Sales Associate / Administrative Assistant



We are seeking a highly motivated and communication-focused VA to join our team as an Inside Sales Associate / Administrative Assistant. In this role, you will be the bridge between our warm leads and our sales team, ensuring our pipeline stays active and no opportunities fall through the cracks.



Responsibilities:



Lead Follow-Up: Use GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM to consistently follow up with warm leads via phone calls, text, and
.



Appointment Setting: Speak with and schedule interested leads to book appointments directly onto the sales team’s calendar.



Pipeline Management: Monitor deals throughout the month as they move through the pipeline to ensure no deal falls through the cracks.



Calendar Management: Efficiently manage and organize the team's calendar to maximize productivity.



Data Integrity: Maintain accurate and up-to-date notes within the CRM regarding lead status and interactions.



Qualifications:



Elite English Proficiency: Must have extremely efficient verbal English skills for professional phone conversations and high-level written English for
s and texts.



CRM Experience: Prior experience using GoHighLevel (GHL) or a similar CRM is highly preferred.



Attention to Detail: Ability to monitor complex pipelines and manage schedules without errors.



Persistence: A "hunter" mentality for following up with leads and a proactive approach to administrative tasks.



Fast Learner: Ability to jump into a fast-paced environment and learn our specific industry workflows quickly.



Our Team & Culture:



We’re proud to have a fantastic, growing team that includes seven other talented VAs. We operate as a supportive unit where everyone’s contribution matters. We are looking for a long-term partner who is enjoyable to work with, reliable, and ready to grow alongside the agency. We are looking to hire for this position as soon as possible.



Benefits:



Starting Salary: $600/month with clear paths for increases.



Performance Growth: Opportunities for salary raises based on continual good performance and impact.



Stability: This is a long-term, stable role within an established team.



Collaborative Environment: Work with a seasoned team of professionals who value your input.



To Apply:



NOTE: You will NOT be considered for this role if you do not include an up-to-date video.



Include your updated resume/CV.



Send an up-to-date video introduction where you introduce yourself, speak about your experience with CRM/Sales, and explain why you’re the best fit for this role. We need to hear your English proficiency and see your personality!

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:

/Instagram.

title: YouTube Content VA (All-in-One: Research, Script, Edit, Upload)
description:
We are building a YouTube channel and looking for a serious, detail-oriented VA who can manage one channel from start to finish.



You will create 1 video per week (6–8 minutes) using a clear system.



This is not passive work — you must be fast, organized, and able to follow instructions.



???? Responsibilities

Find 3–5 trending topics in your niche

Select 1 strong topic (high click potential)

Write a clear 6–8 minute script (AI allowed)

Generate voiceover (ElevenLabs)

Edit video using Filmora (fast-paced style)

Create thumbnail (Canva)

Upload video with title, description, tags

? Requirements (Strict)

Must understand YouTube basics (CTR, retention)

Must follow instructions exactly

Must work independently (no hand-holding)

Basic editing experience (Filmora or CapCut)

Good written English

Reliable daily availability

 Monetization Focus (Important)



Every video must:



Include a tool/product mention

Include “link in description” CTA

Focus on topics that can generate clicks.

Editing Requirement

Scene change every 2–4 seconds

Add captions + B-roll

No long static scenes

Schedule:

1 hour/day

Monday to Friday

Pay:

$3/hour

Performance bonuses available later

To Apply (MANDATORY)



If you do not follow this, your application will be ignored.



Send:



A trending topic in this niche (with link)

A 2–3 sentence hook for that topic

What editing software you use

Write: “FAST PACING” at the top of your message

title: Enterprise Account Executive
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced Enterprise Account Executive to drive revenue growth by managing enterprise client relationships, identifying new business opportunities, and closing high-value SaaS deals. This role requires strong consultative selling skills, pipeline management, and the ability to manage complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles.

 

Key Responsibilities

Client Acquisition & Retention

• Identify and engage enterprise prospects to expand the customer base

• Build and maintain long-term relationships with existing clients

Sales Strategy & Execution

• Execute sales strategies to meet or exceed revenue targets

• Conduct market and account research to understand customer needs

Pipeline Management

• Own the full sales cycle: prospecting, qualification, proposal, negotiation, and close

• Maintain accurate pipeline and forecasting data in CRM (HubSpot or similar)

Solution Selling

• Understand client business challenges and position Allyable’s platform as the solution

• Deliver product demos and enterprise-level presentations

Collaboration

• Work closely with marketing, product, SDR, and customer success teams

• Share market feedback and competitive insights internally

Negotiation & Closing

• Prepare proposals, negotiate contracts, and close deals

• Ensure contracts align with company policies and client expectations

 

Required Qualifications

• 3+ years full-cycle sales experience in SaaS / Cloud / Enterprise software

• Proven ability to consistently hit quota (USD $500k+ annually preferred)

• Strong experience managing complex pipelines and long sales cycles

• Excellent negotiation and closing skills

• Experience using HubSpot or similar CRM

• Ability to manage multiple opportunities simultaneously

• Startup experience is a plus

• Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience

• Fluent in English (additional languages are a plus)

 

Nice to Have / Advantages

• AI or web accessibility industry exposure

• Experience selling into healthcare, retail, insurance, finance, or tech

• Technical background or familiarity with web technologies

• Multilingual
