title: Project Manager
description:
Serve as the main point of contact for clients and dubbing studios/vendors.

Provide regular updates to clients on project progress and timelines.

Address client inquiries promptly and professionally.

Coordinate and follow up with vendors to ensure timely delivery of dubbing files.



Project Delivery:



Ensure all completed projects are delivered to clients on time and in the correct formats.

Verify that all assets (audio tracks, SFX, translated titles, etc.) meet quality standards before delivery.

Collect client feedback post-delivery and communicate any revisions to vendors.



File Management:

Organize and maintain all project files in Google Drive.

Ensure that project folders and files are properly labeled and easy to access for tea members.

Back up critical files and implement version control best practices.



Project Status Reporting:

Provide daily updates on the status of all ongoing projects to the CEO.

Identify and escalate any potential risks, delays, or issues that may impact project timelines.

Create progress reports summarizing completed, pending, and at-risk tasks.



Administrative Support:

Assist with scheduling meetings and maintaining calendars.

Help create and manage invoices, project documentation, and task lists.

Support the automation of workflow processes where possible.



Will Scale to Full-Time within 2 weeks to 1-month (Depends on how quickly you get the hang of things)



Availability Requirement: We need someone who can be available from 6am-6pm CST as we will send work as it comes in.

After the Grace Period: We will have consistent work throughout the 12hrs.

title: Amazon Account Manager (US Market Focus) - with strong English language skills
description:
At EQUALICE, we’re not just looking for employees to fill a position — we’re looking for passionate individuals who bring initiative, creativity, and fresh ideas to our team. People who are eager to grow with us and actively contribute to continuously improving what we do.



Job Description:

As an Amazon Account Manager, you will be responsible for managing and optimizing our Amazon accounts to drive sales and ensure excellent customer service. You will work closely with our PPC, design, and troubleshooting teams to create strategies, solve problems, and improve our product listings.



Your Responsibilities:

Strategic planning and comprehensive management of our clients' Amazon accounts, with a strong focus on the US

marketplace.

Optimization and management of Amazon product listings, including pricing strategies, inventory management, and content optimization.

Regular reporting and analysis of account performance, deriving actionable insights and recommendations to drive growth.

Prepare regular reports on account performance, maintain close collaboration with clients to achieve revenue and performance targets.

Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify growth opportunities.

Collaborate with the PPC team to develop and execute effective advertising campaigns. 

Work with the design team to enhance product listings, including content optimization and image enhancements.

Coordinate with the troubleshooting team to resolve technical issues promptly and effectively.



Qualifications:



Proven experience in managing Amazon seller and vendor accounts, ideally with a focus on the US market.

Strong understanding of Amazon PPC, SEO, and listing optimization. 

Excellent customer service skills. 

Excellent command of English, both written and spoken — no German language skills required.

Independent, structured, and proactive work approach combined with strong teamwork



What We Offer:

The opportunity to actively contribute to the success of our clients on Amazon and shape their growth in one of the world’s leading marketplaces.

Competitive Salary and benefits package. 

Flexible working conditions. 

A supportive, innovative, dynamic and collaborative work environment.

Professional development and training opportunities within a fast-growing, dynamic company.





Interested in joining us?

If you’re looking for a new challenge and want to be part of a motivated, international team, we’d be happy to hear from you. Apply now and let’s grow together!



See you soon,

Manuel & Jonas and the entire EQUALICE team

title: Experienced Fire Alarm or Low Voltage Systems Designer (Remote | $6- $10/hour)
description:
Experienced Fire Alarm / Low Voltage Systems Designer (Remote | $6- $10/hour)



Job Description:



We are looking for a skilled and dependable Fire Alarm / Low Voltage Systems Designer to join our growing team.



This is a remote role for someone with real experience in fire alarm design, and ideally also security, CCTV, and access control systems. We need someone who can produce clean, accurate work, communicate well, and take ownership of their tasks without constant follow-up.



This is not a role for someone who only knows basic drafting. We are looking for a designer who understands system layout, code compliance, submittals, and the level of detail needed for real-world projects.



If you are experienced, responsive, and take pride in doing things right, we’d love to hear from you.



Location: Remote

   Work Type: Freelance, Part-Time, or Full-Time

   Pay: $6-10/hour USD depending on experience, skill level, and overall fit



What You’ll Be Doing



> Design fire alarm, security, CCTV, and access control systems



> Create professional drawings and submittal packages using AutoCAD



> Prepare device layouts, riser diagrams, wiring details, and design documentation



> Ensure designs comply with NFPA, IBC, IFC, and local code requirements



> Revise drawings based on project updates, AHJ comments, and internal feedback



> Coordinate with project managers, contractors, and tea
mbers when needed



What We’re Looking For



> Proven experience in fire alarm system design and/or low voltage systems design



> Strong AutoCAD skills



> Good working knowledge of NFPA 72 and related fire/life safety codes



> Strong attention to detail and accuracy



> Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



> Clear communication and good follow-through



> Someone who is responsive, reliable, and professional





Nice to Have



> NICET certification in Fire Alarm Systems

> Experience preparing complete submittal packages for AHJ approval

> Familiarity with manufacturers such as Fire-Lite, DMP, Kidde, Silent Knight, Honeywell, and similar systems





Why This Role Stands Out



We are building a team for the long term. This role is a real opportunity for the right person to grow with a company that values quality, accountability, and strong systems.



*** If you perform well, there may be room for more hours, a long-term role, and future leadership opportunities.***



How to Apply



We receive a lot of applications, so we only consider candidates who follow instructions carefully.

Please complete all of the steps below:



>> Send your resume

>> Write a short paragraph explaining why you are a strong fit for this role





>> Send a 2-minute video introduction telling us:

*who you are

*your experience in fire alarm / low voltage system design

*why you think you would be a good fit for this role



Upload the video using Google Drive or Loom and include the link in your application





Use this exact subject line in your application:

 Designer Application – [Your Name]



At the very end of your application, include this exact phrase:

 I want to synergize with you



Important!!



Applications that do not follow the instructions above will not be prioritized.

We are looking for someone who is not only technically capable, but also attentive, professional, and serious about the opportunity.

If that sounds like you, we’d be glad to review your application.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 2b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

title: Meta Ads Video Editor
description:
Hey there,



We are a growing E-commerce company and we are looking for someone with extensive knowledge in video editing to create video “hooks” for us. If you have a great editing style, a good eye for engaging clips that match our script, and know you can make some really cool edits, we will be hiring a full-time video editor and they will be eligible for large bonuses and a great long-term career.



What are we looking for?

1. Able to work with minimal supervision

2. Reliable and have a great work ethic

3. Excellent at finding eye-catching / weird clips that “hook” the viewer



How will this job work?

1. We will send you scripts and a voiceover.

2. You will need to go online and find footage, from TikTok, Youtube,
, etc

3. Put them all together with quick cuts to keep viewers engaged, and match the voice over with the captions and video. GET CREATIVE!



These videos are called “hooks” each between 3-10 seconds. They are used as the opening scene for a longer video. It’s very important to use eye-catching clips for the hook to stand out from the crowd and suck the viewer in. A lot of times these clips are very weird/bizarre and make you want to stop and find out what’s going on.



Here are 3 example “hook” videos:





For interested applicants:



Create 3 hooks using the script and voiceover linked below:





**VERY IMPORTANT: Please replicate the EXACT STYLE of the hook-videos linked above (the videos will be for
 ads so use the 9:16 aspect ratio)



******KEEP IN MIND: most people will not go through the trouble of creating a video just for a job application, meaning your chance of getting hired is EXTREMELY HIGH! We’re also hiring multiple editors so your chance of getting hired is even higher. I’m personally reviewing every single video that is submitted!



Please send the videos to 
 along with



1. Resume

2. List of audio/video editing software you use.



Our current video editor (who is at maximum capacity, made over US$2,500 last month from his salary + bonuses).



Talk soon,

Chelsea

title: Google Ads PPC Manager
description:
Full-Time | Remote | 40 Hours/Week | Competitive Salary (DOE)



About Scaliency:

Scaliency is a Phoenix, Arizona-based growth marketing agency that builds complete growth systems for service-based businesses -- websites, paid ads (Google & Meta), SEO, content, CRM automation, and AI-powered lead management. Our clients include home service companies, auto repair shops, contractors, and other service businesses across the US. We onboard 2-4 new clients per month and are building our core team to support that growth.



Job Description:

You will manage Google Ads campaigns across Scaliency's entire client portfolio. You'll build Search campaigns, Demand Gen Campaigns, Performance Max campaigns, and landing page(s) / strategies designed to generate qualified leads for local service businesses. This role requires someone who understands that Google Ads has moved beyond keyword-to-query matching into intent-based and predictive matching, and can build campaigns that work within that reality. You should be comfortable structuring campaigns around user intent rather than just keyword lists, working with Google's AI-driven auction systems, leveraging audience signals and first-party data, and knowing when to let automation work versus when to maintain manual control.



Responsibilities:

* Build and manage Google Ads Search campaigns with multi-ad-group structures for each client (service-specific, location-specific, industry-specific ad groups).



* Build and manage Performance Max campaigns, Brand Campaigns & Demand Gen Campaigns, alongside Search campaigns, know when to launch each, how to prevent cannibalization, and how to use asset groups effectively.



* Conduct keyword research using phrase, broad and/or exact match as primary match types, with strategic use of broad match when backed by strong negative keyword lists and smart bidding.



* Manage bidding strategy transitions, from Maximize Clicks at launch through Maximize Conversions and Target CPA as conversion data accumulates.



* Build and maintain negative keyword lists aggressively (job seekers, DIY/free, competitor brands, non-service-area locations, cross-ad-group prevention).



* Write and optimize Responsive Search Ads, compelling headlines, strong CTAs, strategic pin placement, aiming for "Excellent" ad strength.



* Monitor search terms reports weekly and make adjustments to prevent budget waste from irrelevant intent matching.



* Set up and manage audience layering on Search campaigns (remarketing, in-market audiences) for bidding insights.



* Manage geographic bid adjustments based on conversion data by area.



* Setting up Google Tag Manager (GA4, GA, Analytics and Tags) to ensure conversion tracking is accurate (form submissions, phone calls, calendar bookings).



* Provide monthly performance reporting, cost per conversion, conversion rate by ad group, impression share, CTR, and actionable recommendations.



* Manage ad spend budgets across multiple client accounts and flag budget constraints or opportunities.



* Recommend and build landing pages as needed to improve Quality Score and conversion rates (coordinating with our Web Developers / CRM Specialist).





Requirements:

- 3+ years managing Google Ads accounts with real ad spend (not just certifications).



- Experience building and optimizing Search, Demand Gen campaigns and Performance Max campaigns.



- Understanding of how Google's intent-based matching works in 2025/2026, you know that match types now match on meaning and predicted user behavior, not just literal keywords.



- Experience with bidding strategy selection and transitions (Maximize Clicks, Maximize Conversions, Target CPA, Target ROAS).



- Strong negative keyword management, you build these proactively, not reactively.



- Responsive Search Ad creation and optimization experience.



- Google Ads conversion tracking knowledge & Implementation (working with GA4, GTM, and conversion actions). 



- Experience managing multiple client accounts simultaneously.



- Comfortable reading data and making decisions based on cost-per-lead, conversion rate, and ROAS.



- Familiarity with the Search Terms report and regular query-level optimization.



- Excellent written English and Speaking for ad copy creation



Nice to have: Experience with local service business advertising, familiarity with AI Max for Search campaigns, Google Ads Editor proficiency, experience coordinating with landing pages, expertise in UTM tracking and attribution.





Tools You'll Use (All Provided):

* Google Ads (Search, Performance Max, Display as needed).

* Google Analytics 4.

* Google Tag Manager.

* Google Search Console

* Google My Business Profile(s). 

* Google Keyword Planner.

* Swydo (client reporting).

* ClickUp (task management).

* AI Models (For Ad-Copy and Audit Processes):

   - Claude Pro

   - Gemini Pro





What Working With Us Looks Like:

- Fully remote -- work from anywhere.

- Full-time, Monday-Friday, 40 hours/week.

- Minimum 4 hours overlap with 9am-5pm MST (Arizona time).

- Communication via Click-Up, project management via ClickUp, files via Google Drive / Dropbox.

- Weekly check-ins + ad-hoc calls as needed.

- Long-term position -- we invest in training and want you to grow with us.





How to Apply:

- Please include with your application:

   * Brief summary of your Google Ads experience and types of campaigns you've managed.

   * Monthly ad spend you've managed (approximate range is fine).

   * Expected monthly salary (USD) and your available hours/time zone.

title: Cleaning Operations & Lead Management
description:
We're a growing residential cleaning company looking for a reliable, communicative Virtual Assistant to help run our day-to-day operations. This is a people-facing role that sits at the center of our business — you'll be the bridge between our clients, our cleaners, and our booking system.



Responsibilities

- Interview and onboard new cleaner applicants

- Manage cleaner schedules and dispatch them to jobs via BookingKoala

- Call inbound leads and convert them into confirmed bookings

- Coordinate with cleaners to confirm job details and logistics

- Track all booking data and job activity in Google Sheets

- Handle client follow-ups and general administrative communication



Requirements

- Fluent English — strong written and spoken communication is a must

- Comfortable making and receiving calls with U.S.-based clients and contractors

- Reliable internet connection, personal device, and a secure workspace

- Able to follow data security and confidentiality protocols (full training provided)

- Must be willing to sign an Independent Contractor Agreement before starting

- Experience with BookingKoala, openphone, and Google Sheets.



What We Offer

- Weekly pay in USD 

- Fully remote and flexible hours (within U.S. business hours)

- Long-term opportunity with room to grow as the company scales





Experience Requirements: 

- WORKED AS A CLEANING COMPANY VA BEFORE

- Used Booking Koala



To Apply

Send a brief intro and your relevant experience. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a quick interview via WhatsApp.

title: CONTENT MANAGER / MARKETING LEAD
description:
The Role:

You will own and run our entire content and marketing operation. You are the person who takes raw photos, video clips, and ideas and turns them into a steady stream of content across 6 platforms, every single day. You will manage a full-time video editor and work closely with the owner to build the Alien Prints brand.

This is a high-output role. We aim to publish 60–80+ posts per week across TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube, LinkedIn, and Google Business. You will plan the content calendar, write all copy and captions, create graphics, manage all accounts, engage with the audience, and report on performance



What you will do



Content strategy and calendar

• Plan and manage a weekly content calendar across 6 platforms (TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube, LinkedIn, Google Business)

• Coordinate with shop floor team to collect daily photos and video clips of finished orders and production processes

• Direct the video editor on what clips to create, what hooks to use, and how to format for each platform

• Ensure minimum 2–3 posts per day across platforms, plus daily Stories on Instagram,
, and TikTok 



Content creation

• Write all captions, hooks, and copy for every post — friendly, casual, brand-consistent tone

• Create graphics, carousels, infographics, and image posts using Canva

• Build before/after content from customer design requests and finished products

• Turn customer testimonials, reviews, and photos into branded social content

• Create educational content (print method comparisons, branding tips, industry guides)

• Develop recurring content series: Order of the Month, Transformation Tuesday, How It’s Made, Ask AP 



Platform management

• Manage and post to all accounts: TikTok, Instagram (Reels + Feed + Stories),
, YouTube (Shorts + long-form), LinkedIn

• Respond to all comments and DMs within 4 hours during business days

• Engage with relevant accounts, hashtags, and communities in our target industries

• Stay current on platform trends, algorithm changes, and viral content formats 



Google reviews and reputation

• Manage automated review request system (text/email sent 3 days after delivery)

• Respond to all Google reviews within 24 hours — professional, grateful, brand-consistent

• Goal: reach 100+ reviews with 4.8+ star average within 90 days 



 marketing

• Build and segment
 list from past customers

• Design and send monthly newsletter with new products, seasonal promos, and reorder reminders

• Support automated reorder
 campaigns (30/60/90 days post-delivery) 



Ad creative support

• Create ad images and copy for Meta 
/Instagram) ad campaigns

• A/B test different creative formats and report on performance

• Build a library of high-performing ad assets 



Reporting

• Send weekly analytics report to Jeffry: engagement, reach, follower growth, top posts, review count

• Track content performance and adjust strategy based on what works

• Monthly content audit: what’s working, what’s not, what to try next



Requirements

Must have

• 3+ years managing social media accounts for a business (not personal accounts)

• Experience managing 4+ platforms simultaneously

• Strong English writing skills — natural, conversational, no corporate jargon

• Expert-level Canva skills for graphics, carousels, and infographics

• Experience with Meta Business Suite (scheduling, analytics, ad support)

• Proven ability to plan and execute a content calendar at high volume

• Portfolio showing real social media accounts you’ve managed with growth results



Nice to have

• Experience with
 marketing tools (Mailchimp, GoHighLevel, or similar)

• Basic video editing skills (CapCut, InShot, or similar)

• Experience creating Meta ad creative (images and copy)

• Background in e-commerce, service businesses, or physical products

• Understanding of SEO and Google Business Profile optimization

• Experience managing or directing a video editor or content team

title: Experienced Video Editor Needed for High-Converting VSL + Meta Ads (Final Cut Pro) – Long-Term Opportunity
description:
We are launching a new high-ticket influence and phone sales training program targeted at regular South African men (limited to the first 200 seats at $1,000). We have already generated all raw video clips using Kling AI and have the full voiceover scripts, background music track, and exact timing list ready.

We need a skilled, reliable video editor to assemble everything into professional, high-converting videos. First priority is the main 10:45-minute Video Sales Letter (VSL) + three 10-second vertical Meta ads.

After this initial project, there is strong potential for ongoing work (new ads, social media content, YouTube versions, etc.).

Exact Deliverables (you will receive everything listed below):



Main VSL (10:45 minutes)

9 silent Kling AI clips (exact durations already set: 11s, 12s, 12s, 8s, 8s, 9s, 7s, 9s, 8s)

Full ElevenLabs voiceover script (split into timed sections) + audio files

One background music track + our exact music volume timeline

All text overlays, bullet lists, scarcity counter animations, and branding assets



Three 10-second vertical Meta ads (Versions A, B, C)

3 silent Kling AI clips

Short ElevenLabs voiceover lines per ad

Light upbeat background music + bold text overlays





You will export:



Final VSL as 1080×1920 MP4 (YouTube + landing page version)

3× 9:
 vertical 
 optimized for
/Instagram ads

All project files (FCP or Premiere) so we can make future changes easily



Required Skills & Experience:



Expert level in Final Cut Pro (preferred) or Premiere Pro

Strong experience editing Video Sales Letters (VSLs) or long-form sales videos

Experience with Meta/Facebook/Instagram vertical ads (text overlays, pacing for cold traffic)

Excellent sound mixing (voiceover + music + subtle effects)

Motion graphics / text animation (simple but clean)

Color grading for consistent cinematic look

Ability to follow detailed timing instructions precisely



Nice-to-have (bonus):



Experience with high-ticket coaching or sales training funnels

Knowledge of what converts on Meta in 2026



Work Style:



You will work from our provided raw files (Kling clips, voiceover, music, timing doc).

All communication must be in clear, professional English.

We expect clear communication (WhatsApp or
) and 1–2 revision rounds.

We want someone who cares about conversion (fast pacing, emotional flow, thumb-stopping ads).



Budget & Terms:

We are budgeting $8 – $10 USD per hour for the right candidate with strong VSL/Meta ad experience.

Exceptional applicants with proven high-converting sales video work may be offered up to $12 per hour.

We are also open to a fixed project price for the first batch (VSL + 3 ads) if you prefer.

Payment: Weekly via Wise only — nothing else.

Start: Immediate (we have all files ready).

Trial: We can start with a small paid test (one 10-second ad) to confirm style match.

How to Apply:

Please reply with:



Your hourly rate or fixed quote for the full first project

Link to your portfolio (especially any VSLs, sales videos, or Meta ads you have edited)

Confirmation that you are available to start immediately

Which software you prefer (Final Cut Pro or Premiere)



Serious applicants only. We are looking for a long-term partner, not a one-off gig.

title: Leasing Mastermind & Real Estate Brand Architect -- VA
description:
I am a high-volume Property Manager overseeing a diverse portfolio of long-term leases and Airbnb units. I am looking for a proactive, hyper organized Virtual Assistant with a extremely strong attention to small details. You aren't just managing tasks; you are optimizing revenue, securing new owners, and ensuring our operations run like a Swiss watch.



Key Responsibilities

Listing Excellence: Create, launch, and optimize high-conversion listings across MLS and major rental platforms.



The "Closer" Mindset: Handle outbound cold calling to property owners and manage fast-paced inbound inquiries from prospective tenants (Ads,
 Messenger, and phone).



Virtual Transformation: Use Canva or other staging tools to turn empty rooms into appealing, high-conversion pictures.



Lease & Document Management (Top Priority): Manage lease agreements, move-in/out reports, property documentation, and persistent follow-ups.



Strategic Scheduling: Own the calendar. Coordinate showings, manage appointments, and ensure all current occupants receive proper legal notice for entry.



Airbnb Optimization: Monitor and optimize pricing and revenue for short-term rental units.



IMPORTANT: To show you have high attention to detail, you must start your response with the words "Blue DOTs" and answer questions below. Applications that do not include this will be automatically disqualified.



Screening Questions (Required for Consideration)

Sales & Prospecting: Describe your experience with cold calling and lead qualification. How do you handle objections from property owners, and what is your process for filtering out low-quality tenant leads?



Calendar Management: How long have you managed someone’s professional calendar and what tools (e.g., Calendly, Google Calendar) are you an expert in?



Documentation: Comment on your process for ensuring 100% accuracy when preparing legal documents like leases or move-in reports?

title: Executive / Virtual / Personal Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant / Executive Assistant (Remote, Part-Time, Full-Time Growth)

 

We’re seeking a proactive, highly organized Virtual Assistant to support an entrepreneur with a dynamic lifestyle and multiple business interests. This role spans travel coordination, financial admin, personal projects, digital content support, and more. Ideal for someone resourceful, tech-savvy, and detail-oriented. 



This is a remote, part-time position (20 hours/week with growth to full-time, benefits and bonuses). Requiring 1-2 hours overlap with Pacific Time when it’s needed to reach out to businesses that may only be open 8-5 PST for example. Typically we’d have 1 video meeting per week on Mondays to discuss the priorities and other work is flexible to be completed on your own time with due dates in mind. 



 

Key Responsibilities

• Manage calendars, inboxes, scheduling, prioritization, and follow-through

• Coordinate travel including flights, hotels, transportation, itineraries

• Support property-related needs such as short term airbnb management, scheduling vendors, services, invoices, and monitoring recurring tasks.

• Track and organize expenses; maintain spreadsheet-based reports

• Conduct online research for vendors, pricing, products, market data, and personal projects

• Order essential items, track deliveries/returns, and coordinate gifts and services when needed

• Book personal appointments - health, wellness,, dining, etc.

• Administrative tasks including streamlining personal and business systems

• Learn new tools independently and proactively research solutions without needing step-by-step instruction



 

Requirements

• Excellent spoken and written English with clear, professional communication.

• Prior experience with customer service, spreadsheets, research, travel planning, or financial admin is strongly preferred.

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, consistent, and dependable with reliable internet and computer access.

• Strong Google Workspace proficiency—especially Sheets (formulas, formatting, data cleanup; bonus if pivot tables are familiar).

• Resourceful problem solver—able to complete tasks independently, including entirely new tasks by researching how to do them

• Comfortable using AI tools with the understanding that all outputs must be verified, fact-checked, and properly organized before delivery

• Enjoys learning new tools: Google Workspace, Asana, Claude, ChatGPT, Canva, financial and travel platforms.

• High integrity, ownership mindset, and commitment to delivering accurate, timely, polished work.

• Ability to work autonomously while being accessible for periodic check-ins (e.g., short AM/PM PST  windows).

 

Benefits

• Part-time start (20h first month) with plans to grow into a long-term, full-time role within 1-3 months

• Flexible remote work with weekly check-ins to align the agenda for the week

• Opportunity to learn new systems, take on higher-level projects, and grow with the businesses



Core Values

• Be open, authentic, and communicate with clarity and integrity.

• Take passionate ownership—deliver what you promise, learn from mistakes, and bring solutions.

• Be resourceful, proactive, and committed to customer success.

• Work well with others—show empathy, respect time, and maintain humility with confidence.

• Bloom where you are planted—embrace growth, creativity, and pride in your work.

• Have fun and bring positive energy while striving for excellence.

 



How to Apply

Please submit your application through the form below. Only candidates who complete the form will be considered along with up to date resumes, including months + year to show total duration in a role/company. There will be a loom video exercise to show communication and understanding.




 





Job description link 







Salary:
per month depending on total hours and experience

title: Senior Graphic Designer

mbers to understand design requirements and deliver compelling visual solutions.

- Stay up to date with design trends, tools, and best practices to ensure high-quality and innovative output.

- Provide revisions and refinements based on client feedback to achieve desired results.



Requirements

- Proven experience as a Senior Graphic Designer or in a similar role, supported by a strong portfolio of successful design projects.

- Experience in and kit creation.

- Strong understanding of typography, colour theory, layout, and visual composition.

- Excellent problem-solving skills with strong attention to detail.

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment with minimal supervision.



Location

- Remote position - only candidates based in the Philippines will be considered.



Schedule

- Part-time or Full-time



Benefits

- Competitive compensation based on experience and project scope.

- Opportunity to work with diverse clients and industries.

- Professional growth and development within a creative agency environment.

- Flexible work schedule and fully remote setup.



How to Apply

title: FULL-TIME VIDEO EDITOR
description:
The role

You are the person who takes raw footage and turns it into scroll-stopping content. Every day, you will receive raw video clips from our shop floor (printing presses running, orders being made, finished products) and talking-head recordings from the owner. Your job is to edit these into short-form and long-form videos optimized for each platform.



This is a high-volume role. You will produce 8–15 edited video pieces per day across different formats. Speed, consistency, and understanding of what makes content perform on social media are essential.



What you will do

Short-form video editing (primary focus — 70% of time)

• Edit raw clips into 15–60 second videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

• Add captions/subtitles to all videos (burned-in, styled, readable)

• Write and add text hooks in the first 1–2 seconds of every video

• Add transitions, zoom effects, and pacing that match platform trends

• Select and sync trending audio/music where appropriate

• Create satisfying loop videos from production process footage (press pulls, ink shots, transfer peels)

• Edit before/after reveal videos with dramatic transitions

• Format and resize the same video for different platforms (9:16, 1:1, 16:9)



Long-form video editing (20% of time)

• Edit 1 long-form YouTube video per week (5–15 minutes)

• Full process walkthroughs: a single order from design to shipping

• Educational content: print method comparisons, branding guides, industry tips

• Add intro/outro, lower thirds, chapter markers, and b-roll where needed

• Create compelling thumbnails for YouTube videos



Ad creative (10% of time)

• Edit short video ads for Meta 
/Instagram) campaigns

• Create multiple variations of the same ad for A/B testing

• Follow direct creative briefs from the Content Manager



Daily output expectations

• 8–10 short-form videos (TikTok/Reels/Shorts format) per day

• 2–3 Stories-format clips per day

• 1 long-form YouTube video per week

• 1–2 ad creatives per week



All edited videos are delivered to the Content Manager via shared Google Drive folder. The Content Manager handles all posting and scheduling.



Requirements

Must have

• 2+ years of experience editing short-form video content (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

• Portfolio/reel showing at least 10 short-form videos you’ve edited

• Proficient in CapCut Pro, Adobe Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

• Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, captions, and trending formats

• Ability to turn around 8–10 short clips per day consistently

• Understanding of what makes content perform on each platform (TikTok vs Reels vs Shorts)

• Clean, professional editing style — not over-edited, not under-edited



Nice to have

• Experience editing content for product-based or service-based businesses

• YouTube long-form editing experience (chapters, b-roll, pacing)

• Motion graphics or animation skills (After Effects, Motion)

• Thumbnail design skills (Photoshop or Canva)

• Basic color correction and audio cleanup skills

• Familiarity with royalty-free music libraries and sound design

title: Detail Detective – Video Transaction Reviewer
description:
Job Summary

The Transaction Auditor is responsible for accurately processing customer purchase transactions across all market locations. This role involves reviewing video footage to verify items taken, encoding items into the system with correct quantities, and ensuring that all daily transactions are completed with precision and consistency.



This position requires strong attention to detail, high levels of focus, patience for repetitive tasks, and a strong sense of accountability.



Key Responsibilities

- Review video footage to verify customer purchases.

- Identify items taken and accurately encode them into the system, including correct quantities.

- Process transactions efficiently, averaging 1 to 2 minutes per transaction.

- Ensure all transactions for the assigned shift or day are completed.

- Flag inconsistencies, discrepancies, and any other i
.

- Escalate and report irregularities, suspicious activity, or system issues promptly.

- Maintain high accuracy levels, especially when distinguishing between similar-looking items.

- Ensure consistent attendance and availability during assigned working hours.

- Follow established procedures and maintain confidentiality of footage and transaction data.





Qualifications

- High attention to detail and strong visual accuracy.

- Ability to maintain focus for extended periods.

- Patient and comfortable performing repetitive tasks throughout the day.

- Strong sense of responsibility and commitment to completing daily workload.

- Ability to detect inconsistencies and exercise sound judgment.

- Basic computer proficiency and ability to quickly learn transaction systems.

- Strong integrity and reliability.

- Good written and verbal communication skills for reporting issues.

- Must demonstrate consistent attendance and punctuality.





Preferred Attributes

- Experience in transaction processing, auditing, or retail operations is an advantage.

- Experience reviewing CCTV footage is a plus.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

- Strong organizational and time management skills.



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do all of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

3. Add the Letters "TA" in the "What's your full name" field [E.g. TA - John Doe], so we know what role you are applying for.

title: HubSpot Expert (Custom Reporting)
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a HubSpot Expert with strong experience in building custom reports and dashboards inside HubSpot. The ideal candidate should be highly familiar with HubSpot CRM data structures and capable of creating actionable reports that support marketing, sales, and operational decision-making.



Key Responsibilities

* Build and maintain custom reports within HubSpot

* Create dashboards to track marketing, sales, and operational performance

* Analyze CRM data and present insights through clear reporting structures

* Optimize HubSpot reporting for better visibility and decision-making

* Work with the team to identify reporting needs and implement data tracking improvements

* Ensure reports are accurate, automated, and easy for the team to interpret



Required Skills and Experience

* Strong experience using HubSpot CRM

* Proven experience building custom reports and dashboards in HubSpot

* Understanding of HubSpot data objects such as contacts, companies, deals, and activities

* Ability to organize CRM data for reporting and analysis

* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

* Excellent communication and ability to explain reporting insights clearly



Ideal Candidate

We are looking for someone who has previously built HubSpot reporting systems, understands CRM data deeply, and can translate business questions into meaningful reports and dashboards. The candidate should be proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with data-driven teams.

title: Executive Operations Virtual Assistant (Construction & Real Estate)
description:
Executive Operations Virtual Assistant (Construction & Real Estate)



Executive Construction Homes - Remote (Philippines Only)

Pay: $8–$10/hour (Based on Experience)

Schedule: Full-Time - Must Overlap with US (EST) Hours



About the Role

To serve as the strategic hub for Executive Operations, ensuring project 
ntum through clear communication, organized systems, and consistent follow-through across construction, financial coordination, and legal processes. This role is designed for someone who thrives on collaboration, communication, and keeping people aligned and informed while moving work forward efficiently.



You will be the connector of people, projects, and priorities—ensuring that everyone is working together, nothing falls through the cracks, and leadership has clarity without being pulled into day-to-day noise.



Core Responsibilities



Executive Coordination and Communication — Ensure leadership, field teams, and vendors stay aligned through proactive communication, organized scheduling, and consistent updates that keep projects moving forward.

Project Tracking and Visibility — Maintain accurate and up-to-date project tracking in 
, ensuring all stakeholders have clear visibility into timelines, progress, and next steps.

Lender and Financial Coordination — Support communication with lenders and assist in managing the draw process to ensure smooth, timely funding and strong financial relationships.

Vendor and Partner Collaboration — Build strong, professional relationships with vendors and partners, ensuring follow-ups are handled, expectations are clear, and work continues without delays.

Closings and Legal Coordination — Assist with organizing and coordinating land acquisitions and closings, ensuring documentation is complete and timelines are met with minimal friction.

Process and System Support — Help build, document, and improve systems and SOPs so the company continues to scale in an organized, sustainable way.



The Operational Rhythm (How You Keep Things Moving)



Daily Pulse — Start each day by reviewing priorities, organizing the calendar, responding to key communications, and identifying any potential delays or issues that need attention. Maintain steady communication across teams to ensure alignment and progress.

Weekly Rhythm — Support scheduling and coordination of key meetings, track progress across projects, assist with reporting, and follow up with vendors and partners to ensure everything is on track and moving forward.

Workflow Ownership (How Work Gets Done)



You will help manage and support key workflows such as coordinating project updates, assisting with the draw and funding process, and ensuring communication flows smoothly between teams. You will take information from multiple sources, organize it, and ensure the right people have what they need to move forward.

You are not expected to do everything alone—you are expected to collaborate, communicate, and ensure the process keeps moving.



Tech Stack Ecosystem



You will work within a structured system of tools that support communication, tracking, and execution. This includes 
 for project tracking, Google Workspace for communication and organization, lender portals for financial coordination, and shared systems for documentation and closing processes.

Decision Rights and Ownership



You will confidently handle day-to-day coordination, scheduling, communication, and follow-ups while keeping leadership informed. You will identify issues, gather information, and recommend solutions, while supporting leadership in executing larger decisions. Your role is to keep 
ntum strong by taking initiative, staying organized, and working collaboratively across all parties involved.

Who We're Looking For



We are specifically looking for someone with strong I and S behavioral traits. You are naturally people-oriented, positive, and communicative, while also being dependable, patient, and consistent in your work. You build trust easily, work well with different personalities, and create a sense of stability and teamwork across the organization.

You are highly resourceful and collaborative. You enjoy working with others, solving problems together, and making sure everyone feels supported and informed. You don't let things stall—you follow up, communicate clearly, and keep things moving in a professional and supportive way.

You take pride in being organized, reliable, and someone others can count on.



Requirements

3+ years experience as a Virtual Assistant, Executive Assistant, or Administrative/Operations support role

Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal

Experience with project management or organizational tools (
, Asana, ClickUp, etc.)

Highly organized with strong follow-through and attention to detail

Ability to work with overlap during US business hours



Preferred

Experience in construction, real estate, or property management

Experience supporting teams, vendors, or client communication

Experience working in collaborative, team-based environments



What You Get

This is a long-term opportunity with a growing US-based company where you will be a key part of keeping operations running smoothly. You will work in a collaborative environment where communication, teamwork, and reliability are valued. There is strong opportunity for growth, increased responsibility, and compensation over time.

How to Apply



Please include a short summary of your experience, tools you've used, an example of how you've helped keep a team or project organized, and your availability including hours and internet reliability.



We are looking for someone who enjoys being the steady, reliable connector that keeps people aligned, projects moving, and communication flowing. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Meta Ads Creative VA
description:
About Us

BAZIC Products (
) is a one-stop shop for 1,600+ school, office, and art essentials. We're scaling

our Meta ad creative production and need a reliable VA to help us produce static ad creatives at volume from

provided briefs.

Our current goal is 30 finished ad creatives per week, with plans to scale up as the system grows.

This is a long-term role for the right person.



What You'll Do



-Produce finished Meta static ad creatives from provided creative briefs composite product images, text overlays, review cards, and offer badges onto ad backgrounds.

-Run AI image generation prompts and download outputs for compositing

-Organize and maintain ad files and product image library in Google Drive



Tools



We work with a mix of design and AI tools. Strong candidates will have experience with some combination

of the following — you don't need to know all of them, but the more the better:



-Adobe Photoshop — image compositing, background removal, layer management

-Adobe Illustrator — vector adjustments, logo handling, layout work

-Canva — template editing, image compositing, brand kit

-Generative AI tools — experience with at least one AI image generation tool (Midjourney, DALL·E, Higgsfield, or similar)



You're the Right Fit If You



-Can take a written creative brief and produce a finished ad without hand-holding

-Are fast, organized, and consistent — this is an execution role, not a strategy role

-Have produced static ad creatives before — not just organic social content

-Communicate proactively when something is unclear rather than guessing

-Can comfortably hit 30 creatives per week and scale up from there



To Apply

Send the following:

1. Two examples of static ad creatives you've produced

2. Which design and AI tools you use and your experience level with each

Applications without examples will not be reviewed.

title: END-TO-END ACCOUNTANT/BOOKKEEPER
description:
FULL-TIME NIGHT SHIFT | Remote | For High-Performance Professionals Only



Pivotl is seeking an exceptional Remote Accountant to join our specialized team providing advanced accounting services across the United States. This is a FULL-TIME, NIGHT SHIFT position designed for seasoned professionals who thrive under pressure and deliver excellence consistently.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a side job or flexible arrangement. We need dedicated professionals accustomed to night shift operations who can commit to full-time hours. If you're seeking part-time work or are uncomfortable with night schedules, please do not apply.



What Sets This Role Apart

- 4-day work week, 3 days off - Maximize your work-life balance

- Premium compensation for proven high performers

- Comprehensive benefits: Paid vacation/sick leave, extensive paid training, generous Christmas bonus

- Complete autonomy in a remote environment - perfect for self-directed professionals

- Specialized focus on HOME SERVICE industries (HVAC, Solar, and related sectors)



The Challenge - Are You Ready?



We need a financial data cleanup specialist who can handle:

- Granular-level financial data reconciliation across complex business structures (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, AR, Vendor Recon)

- High-pressure deadline management while maintaining 100?curacy

- Independent problem-solving of complex accounting discrepancies

- Proactive identification and resolution of financial irregularities

- Core Responsibilities for Elite Performers

- Execute comprehensive book-cleanup projects with tight deadlines

- Perform detailed adjusting entries with a deep understanding of tax implications

- Master QuickBooks Online for complex multi-entity structures

- Conduct advanced data analysis using Excel and Google Sheets

- Manage full-cycle AR/AP, invoicing, payroll, and bank reconciliations

- Deliver precise categorization and accounting across diverse business models



Non-Negotiable Requirements

- Proven track record in US accounting with demonstrable results

- Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online

- Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills for complex data manipulation

- Exceptional English communication - written and verbal

- Night shift availability - this is not flexible

- Autonomous work style - you must be self-directed and proactive

- Competitive Advantages (Preferred)

- Industry background in HVAC, solar, generators, roofing, foundations, or electrical

- Construction/contracting industry experience highly valued

- Experience using any of the following: Service Titan, Housecall Pro, Sera, Jobber, Service Trade, Acculynx, etc

- Experience using Keeper.app



Who Should Apply

- Rock stars only. We want professionals who:

- Thrive in high-pressure, deadline-driven environments

- Work autonomously without constant supervision

- Have extensive experience cleaning up complex historical financial data

- Take ownership of results and deliver consistent excellence

- Are committed to full-time night shift operations



Who Should NOT Apply

- Those seeking part-time or flexible arrangements

- Professionals are uncomfortable with night shift schedules

- Anyone looking for a "side job" or supplemental income

- Those requiring extensive hand-holding or micromanagement

- Ready to prove you're among the elite?



Apply Here: 
reers/bookkeeping-role

Pivotl - Where exceptional professionals build exceptional careers.

title: 3PL Compliance & Finance Specialist
description:
Compliance & Finance Specialist - Ally Logistics



ABOUT ALLY LOGISTICS:

Ally Logistics is a U.S.-based third-party logistics (3PL) company headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Since 2012, we’ve been committed to creating the ultimate freight shipping experience by operating at the optimal intersection of people and technology.



As a full-service 3PL, we specialize in a wide range of freight solutions, including dry van, refrigerated, drayage, straight truck, open deck/flatbed, drop-trailer programs, warehousing, and more. Our diverse service capabilities allow us to support shippers across industries with flexible, reliable, and scalable logistics strategies.

We partner with skilled global talent to support our continued growth and operational excellence, ensuring our customers receive efficient, high-quality service at every step of the supply chain.





ROLE SUMMARY:

The Compliance & Finance Specialist plays a critical role in ensuring the integrity and efficiency of Ally Logistics’ carrier network and financial operations. This role is responsible for thoroughly vetting carriers using the Highway platform, maintaining accurate carrier profiles and records within the TMS, and providing timely communication with agents and internal teams. On the finance side, the coordinator performs credit assessments, manages escalations following established protocols, and monitors both customer and carrier invoices to ensure timely payment. This position requires after-hours support to resolve accounts payable and receivable issues, ensuring seamless operational and financial compliance across the organization.



Regular Weekly Schedule (40 hours): Monday – Friday: 12:00 PM – 9:00 PM Eastern Standard Time with 1-hour unpaid lunch break.





JOB DUTIES/RESPONSIBILITIES: 



COMPLIANCE:

-Thoroughly Vet Carriers through Highway Platform

-Efficient and proficient communication with Agents and Ally Logistics Employees when needed

-Working within TMS, updating carrier profiles, notes, and manually turning carriers on/off



FINANCE:

-Perform credit assessments and manage escalations using an established escalation matrix and external credit monitoring tools, including after-hours support

-Process and monitor customer and carrier invoices to ensure timely payment, and resolve accounts payable and accounts receivable escalations as needed after hours



KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs)

-Response time to Agent questions/inquiries is 5 minutes or less for compliance and finance escalations





COMPENSATION:

-Compensation will be determined based on experience.



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:

-Minimum of 2 years of experience in logistics/3PL industry

-Minimum of 2 years of compliance or finance experience, preferably within the logistics/3PL industry

-Experience working with Freight Agents

-Experience within Front and Highway

-Strong written and verbal English communication skills

-Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

-Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

-High attention to detail and accuracy

-Exceptional organizational and time management skills



Access to:

-A reliable computer with  high-speed internet

-Backup internet source (mobile hotspot or secondary line preferred)

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Headset

-Professional remote workspace

-Ability to work U.S. business hours (EST)



Experience with:

-Outlook

-Zoom phone

-Slack

-Basic CRM or logistics platform

Additional Requirements

1. Technology & Equipment Requirements

-Reliable high-speed internet and computer

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Quiet, professional workspace



2. Availability Requirements

-Ability to work U.S. Eastern Time

-Must provide advanced notice for planned time off

-Must maintain consistent communication (Slack responsiveness,
, etc.)

title: Bookkeeper/Accountant
description:

---



### **Responsibilities**



* Maintain accurate financial records in **QuickBooks Online** 

* Categorize transactions and reconcile bank/credit card accounts

* Manage Accounts Payable & Accounts Receivable

* Prepare monthly financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)

title: Digital Marketing & Paid Media Specialist, Media Buyer
description:
About Empire Creative Marketing



Empire Creative Marketing is a full-service marketing agency specializing in strategic, high-performance marketing for industrial, B2B, and professional service companies. We are known for delivering measurable results through data-driven strategies, compelling creative, and integrated digital campaigns.



We are seeking a highly skilled, full-time Virtual Assistant with deep expertise in digital marketing, paid media, and analytics. This is a senior-level execution role for someone who can manage campaigns end-to-end, think strategically, and deliver polished, client-ready work with minimal oversight.



Position Overview



The Digital Marketing & Paid Media Specialist will be responsible for planning, building, managing, and optimizing paid campaigns across Google and Meta platforms, while ensuring proper tracking, reporting, and performance optimization through GA4 and Google Tag Manager.



This role requires a strong combination of technical proficiency, analytical thinking, and creative execution, including the ability to design high-performing ad creatives using Canva.



Key Responsibilities:

• Paid Media Strategy & Execution

• Plan, launch, and manage paid campaigns across:

• Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max, YouTube)

• Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

• Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and competitive analysis

• Build campaign structures aligned with funnel strategy and client goals

• Continuously optimize campaigns for performance (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS)



Google Ads Management: 

• Create and manage search, display, and retargeting campaigns

• Write high-converting ad copy aligned with brand voice

• Optimize bidding strategies, budgets, and targeting

• Monitor Quality Scores and improve ad relevance



Meta Ads Management:

• Build and manage campaigns inside Meta Ads Manager

• Develop audience segments (cold, warm, retargeting, lookalikes)

• Test creative variations and messaging

• Optimize for conversions, leads, and engagement

• Tracking, Analytics & Data Integrity

• Set up and manage Google Tag Manager (GTM)



Implement and troubleshoot tracking for:

• Conversion events

• Pixels (Meta, Google)

• Form submissions, calls, and key actions

• Configure and manage Google Analytics 4 (GA4)

• Ensure accurate attribution and data flow across platforms

• Reporting & Performance Analysis

• Analyze campaign performance and identify optimization opportunities

• Create clear, client-ready performance reports (weekly/monthly)

• Translate data into actionable insights and recommendations



Monitor KPIs such as:

• Cost per lead (CPL)

• Conversion rate

• Return on ad spend (ROAS)



Creative Development:

• Design high-performing ad creatives using Canva, including: Social media ads, Display ads, Variations for A/B testing

• Collaborate with strategy team to align visuals with messaging

• Ensure all creative meets brand standards and campaign objectives

• Landing Page design and development 

• Collaborate on landing page strategy to improve conversions



Provide recommendations for:

• Messaging

• UX/UI improvements

• Conversion optimization



Required Qualifications:

• 3–5+ years of experience in digital marketing and paid media management

• Proven expertise in: Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Google Tag Manager (GTM), Google Analytics 4 (GA4)

• Strong understanding of conversion tracking and attribution models

• Experience designing ad creatives in Canva

• Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple campaigns simultaneously



Preferred Qualifications:

• Experience working in a digital marketing agency environment

• Familiarity with B2B and industrial marketing

• Experience with landing page platforms (WordPress, HubSpot, or similar)

• Knowledge of CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) best practices

• Experience with Looker Studio or other reporting dashboards



Key Traits for Success:

• Detail-oriented and highly organized

• Data-driven decision maker

• Proactive problem solver

• Strong sense of ownership and accountability

• Ability to execute quickly without sacrificing quality



What Success Looks Like:

• Campaigns are launched efficiently and perform above benchmarks for multiple clients

• Tracking and analytics are accurate and reliable

• Consistent improvement in lead quality and cost efficiency

• Clear, professional reporting that clients can easily understand

• Creative assets that drive engagement and conversions

title: Lead Generation & Skip Tracing Specialist
description:
About Us

Get My Refund Pro, founded and operated by a husband and wife team, is a tax sale excess funds recovery company dedicated to helping property owners and heirs reclaim funds they are rightfully owed. We are a small, fast-moving operation with a big mission, and we are growing. We take pride in doing this work with integrity, accuracy, and care for the people we serve.

About the Role

We are looking for a sharp, self-directed Lead Generation & Skip Tracing Specialist to join our remote team. In this role, you will be the engine behind our pipeline,  locating property owners, heirs, and next of kin associated with tax sale excess funds claims. Your research directly determines who gets helped and how quickly.

This starts as a part-time position (10–20 hours per week) with very real potential to grow into a full-time role as our caseload expands.

What You'll Do

• Use skip tracing tools (TruthFinder, or similar) to locate current contact information for property owners, heirs, and relatives

• Make brief verification calls to confirm or rule out contact information — professional, scripted, and low-pressure

• Maintain accurate records and update our tracking system with findings – excel based

• Flag deceased claimants and identify next of kin or estate contacts

• Communicate findings clearly and efficiently to the team



What We're Looking For

• Strong verbal English communication skills — you will occasionally make brief phone calls to verify information

• Experience with skip tracing tools such as TruthFinder, or other subscribed to account is a significant plus

• High attention to detail and accuracy — this work matters to real people

• Ability to work independently, manage your own time, and stay organized

• Familiarity with legal and ethical guidelines for skip tracing

• Prior experience in tax sale, excess funds, real estate, or collections is a plus — but not required; we provide video-based training



Compensation

This is an hourly paid, fully remote position. When applying, please include your requested hourly rate.

How to Apply

Send your resume and a brief note about your relevant experience, including your requested hourly rate, to: 


 

Use the subject line: Skip Tracing Specialist – [Your Name]



Get My Refund Pro is an equal opportunity employer. We value diversity and are committed to an inclusive and respectful work environment.

title: Experienced Google Ads & Meta Ads Account Manager (Multiple Accounts))
description:
Looking for your next opportunity to do meaningful, high-impact paid advertising work? We're a growing U.S.-based digital marketing agency managing paid advertising across Google and Meta for a diverse roster of clients - e-commerce brands, local service businesses, law firms, real estate, nonprofits, and more. We need a skilled ads manager who can jump in and start managing client ad accounts.



What You'll Be Doing:



You'll be managing multiple client ad accounts across Google Ads and/or Meta Ads. Day-to-day work includes campaign builds, optimization, budget management, audience targeting, ad copy/creative collaboration, and performance reporting. The focus is always on driving real business results - leads, sales, ROAS - not vanity metrics.

You'll get to work across a range of industries, so the work stays fresh and your experience keeps growing.



Who We're Looking For:



We're looking for someone who already knows the platforms well and is excited to put their skills to work. You should be comfortable independently managing campaigns, spotting opportunities, diagnosing issues, and making smart optimization decisions. Specifically, we'd love to see hands-on experience with campaign setup and structure across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and/or Meta (Advantage+, retargeting, full-funnel setups). A solid understanding of conversion tracking (Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel/CAPI) is important, along with a results-first mindset (you optimize toward cost per lead, cost per acquisition, and ROAS), not just impressions and clicks. Experience managing multiple accounts in an agency or freelance setting and strong communication skills round things out.



Bonus Points For:



Experience with Google Merchant Center, Shopping feeds, CallRail or call tracking platforms, landing page feedback/CRO thinking, or Klaviyo/email platform familiarity.



Why Join Us:



Your work will directly impact the success of the businesses we serve, and that's something we take a lot of pride in. We believe in clear communication, mutual respect, and giving our team the autonomy to do their best work. We value people who take ownership, and we reward that with trust and room to grow.

As we continue to expand, there's real opportunity here to take on larger accounts, develop your skills across new verticals, and step into a senior or leadership role within the team.



To Apply:



I'd love to hear from you. Please tell me about your experience managing Google and/or Meta ad accounts. Include specific examples of results you've driven (leads generated, ROAS achieved, cost per acquisition improvements, etc.). If you have any case studies or screenshots, even better.

Thank you!
