title: Executive and Personal Assistant
description:
We are a Toronto-based IT and cybersecurity firm serving professional services companies across Canada. We are a small, high-performing team of five.



Our founder and CEO is a visionary operator managing a fast-moving business, investment properties, and personal commitments at the same time. This hire exists to take the cognitive load off his plate — turning his ideas and priorities into action, keeping the team moving forward, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.



THE ROLE



This is an Executive and Personal Assistant role with real teeth. You will be the person the CEO thinks out loud with, hands things off to, and trusts to run with them. You will interact with the team, drive follow-through, flag what is slipping, and keep projects moving without being asked twice.



This person will be in meetings, on calls, and across documents with the CEO daily. They will retain details, anticipate needs, and have information ready before it is asked for. If the CEO is heading to a client site, the address, suite number, contact name, and reason for the visit are already in his calendar before he asks. This is not a role for someone who needs to be reminded twice.



The split is roughly 80% business and 20% personal, with approximately 20% of your time also supporting other tea
mbers. Start date is the second week of June.



Hours: 9am to 5pm Eastern Time during onboarding (60 to 90 days), then shifting to 7am to 3pm ET.



This role has no ceiling. The more capable and proactive you are, the more responsibility you will earn.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Execution and Follow-Through



Receive direction and ideas from the CEO and turn them into moving parts

Coordinate with tea
mbers to make sure tasks are assigned, understood, and completed

Track open items, follow up without being asked, and bring back status updates not problems

Maintain accountability on internal projects and process builds

QA on internal processes to ensure steps are not skipped

Communications and Inbox



Own the CEO inbox, triage, prioritize, and draft replies to near-send quality. Target: CEO clicks send without editing 8 out of 10 times.

Screen and route incoming calls as warm, professional first point of contact

Manage calendar, schedule meetings, and coordinate logistics

Communicate professionally with clients, vendors, and contacts on behalf of the CEO

Business Operations



Maintain and update CRM with new meetings, contacts, and follow-ups

Track client check-ins and coordinate quarterly and 6-month touchpoints

Monitor helpdesk queue and flag CEO-relevant tickets

Support internal process documentation including SOPs, wikis, and system guides

Light project management, track open tasks, follow up on outstanding items

Coordinate with internal team on overflow admin tasks

Marketing and Content



Draft and schedule LinkedIn and social media posts based on CEO direction

Repurpose existing content including recordings and notes into posts and
s

Light research on competitors, tools, and industry trends

Personal Admin and Property



Research, compare, and execute on personal tasks including insurance, logistics, vendor negotiations, purchases, and warranty claims

Personal travel booking and logistics every 6 months

Handle vendor and provider calls on behalf of the CEO

Light coordination on investment properties and an Airbnb including guest communication, cleaner bookings, and annual rental admin

WHO YOU ARE



Business-level English is non-negotiable. Written and spoken communication must be clean, professional, and client-ready. Western business English grammar and fluency is required, not just the ability to be understood. You will communicate with clients and vendors on behalf of the CEO and represent the company in writing and on calls.

You are anticipatory, not reactive. You think one step ahead and have what the CEO needs before he asks for it.

You retain details. Clients, addresses, project context, open items — you know where everything is and can retrieve it instantly without attitude.

Smart, driven, and not a pushover — you push back respectfully and get things done.

Detail-oriented by nature, you catch errors, close loops, and do not let things fall through the cracks.

You take initiative and bring back solutions not questions.

Entrepreneurial mindset, you have operated with ownership or managed others.

Warm and high-energy, someone people genuinely want to work with.

Comfortable handling both business and personal tasks without treating either as beneath you.

Discreet with access to personal finances, client relationships, and property matters.

Fluent with AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude and uses them to work faster and smarter.

THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



You need detailed instructions before you can start

You prefer to wait and be told rather than anticipate and act

You consider personal tasks or property coordination beneath an EA role

You need to be reminded about details you have already been given

Your spoken or written English requires effort to understand

WHAT WE OFFER



USD $1,200/month, full-time

Fully remote, work from home

90-day trial with a structured review and compensation increase for strong performers

A role with no ceiling, responsibilities grow with your capability

Paid time off

TECH AND SECURITY



As a cybersecurity-focused firm, you will be required to install our standard security suite on your work computer. Your device must be used for work purposes only and not shared with household members. Full details provided upon offer.



HOW TO APPLY



Begin your application message with the word ZEBRA or your application will not be reviewed.



Complete both of the following steps. Applications missing either will not advance.



Step 1: Record a 2-minute video (Loom or similar) and answer this question: Tell us about a time you solved a problem that was not your job. What happened, what did you do, and what was the outcome. Include the link in your application.



Step 2: Write a short
 on our behalf using the following scenario: You are
ing a client to let them know their server maintenance is scheduled for this Saturday between 10pm and 2am. Reassure them that disruption will be minimal and that the team will be available if anything comes up. Paste this
 directly into your application message.



Applications where the video does not demonstrate business-level English fluency will not advance regardless of other qualifications.



We are looking for one person who is exactly right. We will take the time to find them.



That is the final version. The written
 test is the new addition that will do the most work for you — grammar, tone, business judgment, and English quality all visible before you watch a single video or take a single call.

title: SOCIAL MEDIA CONTENT CREATOR & VIDEO EDITOR
description:
I'm looking for a creative, detail-oriented content creator to produce polished short-form content for my wellness brand — with room to grow long-term.



What you'll be doing:

Video Editing

Receive raw footage filmed in person and edit into short-form content: Instagram Reels, Stories, and similar formats

Ensure edits align with brand aesthetic — warm, grounded, professional



Content Creation

Design graphics and visual assets for social media

Write captions that match brand voice

Collaborate with our VA who handles scheduling and posting



Who you are:

Strong eye for aesthetics — you understand what performs well on Instagram and short-form platforms

Experienced with video editing software 

Proficient in Canva or similar design tools

Self-directed and able to work from general direction

Reliable with deadlines



Details:

With room to grow

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a Zoom interview

Bonus: familiarity with wellness, health coaching, or similar niches

Hours/wage flexible/negotiable



Ideal candidates are comfortable with platforms such as: Canva (or similar design tools), Instagram, Meta Business Suite, video editing software of your choice (Captcut will not be accepted), Google Workspace, and Asana or Notion for project coordination.



To Apply:

To be considered, please begin your application with the word LIGHTHOUSE. Then please share: what video editing software you use (please note that CapCut is not used for this role). Additionally, include a portfolio with examples of short-form video edits and social media graphics, and tell me about one specific piece of work you're proud of — what was it, what was the goal, and what would you do differently now?

title: Experienced Short-Term Rental Property Manager (Guesty Expert Required)
description:
About Us: We are a growing short-term rental business looking for two dedicated and experienced Virtual Assistants to join our team. We pride ourselves on providing 5-star experiences for our guests, and we need tea
mbers who are detail-oriented, reliable, and tech-savvy.



The Role: We are looking for candidates who can hit the ground running. You will be responsible for managing day-to-day guest communications and operations. Because our systems are already in place, prior experience with Guesty is non-negotiable.



Key Responsibilities:



Manage all guest communications via Guesty (inquiries, check-in instructions, troubleshooting, and reviews).



Coordinate cleaning and maintenance schedules.



Monitor pricing and occupancy rates.



Resolve guest issues promptly and professionally.



General administrative tasks to support property operations.



Requirements:



MUST HAVE: Proven experience using Guesty. Please do not apply if you have not used this specific software.



Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.



Ability to work [48] hours per week.



Reliable high-speed internet connection and a backup power source.



Bonus Skills:



Experience with Guesty Expertise is a huge bonus



Experience with Airbnb, VRBO, and 
 platforms.



Compensation: $1000-$1200 per month



Salary is competitive and based on your level of experience and skill set.

How to Apply: Please send your resume. Please send a message to us on this job post and send message thru Whatsapp to
answering the following questions. 



A short summary of your short-term rental property management experience

1.Your specific experience using Guesty? How many year of virtual assistance experience?

2.How many listings/properties you managed in Guesty at one time

3.The tasks you handled in Guesty (guest communication, operations, maintenance coordination, cleaning coordination, etc.)

4.Your level of experience with Guesty from 1–10

5.Your expected hourly pay



Subject Line: Please use the subject line "Guesty Expert - [Your Name]" so we know you read the full post.

title: Operations & Administrative Assistant
description:
Operations & Administrative Assistant

Type: Full-Time (40 hrs/week)

Compensation & Growth

• Starting rate: $5.00 USD/hour

• 90-day milestone (if retained): 20% salary increase to $6.00/hr + one-time 10% performance bonus

• Year-one target: $7–$8/hr based on performance and business growth

• 8 hours paid daily, including a 1-hour paid lunch break

We invest in people who invest in us. If you show up, own your work, and grow with the role — your compensation will grow too.



About the Company

Beyond The Fall is a global preparedness brand built around a massive 852-page hardcover survival encyclopedia — the product of 5 years of development with 80+ expert contributors from 50 countries. We sell direct-to-consumer and through Amazon across the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and Europe. We’re a small, fast-moving team that takes our work seriously but keeps things fun. If you want to be part of building something meaningful from the ground up, this is your chance.

About the Role



We’re looking for a sharp, organized, and proactive Operations & Administrative Assistant to help run our day-to-day execution. You’ll touch almost every part of the business — from processing orders, to coordinating with warehouses across 5 countries, to managing our social media, to building operational reports that keep leadership informed.



Your shift starts at 4 PM Eastern, and your first priority every day is entering orders into our global fulfillment network before regional cutoffs. After that, you’ll shift into social media, customer support, tracker maintenance, and operational reporting. You’ll work directly with the founders and have clear SOPs for everything.



You won’t be micromanaged. You’ll be given clear systems and expected to own your responsibilities. If you’re the type who can manage multiple workstreams, flag issues before they become problems, and keep things running smoothly — we want to hear from you.



What You’ll Do

Order Processing & 3PL Fulfillment (First Priority Daily)

• Process all pending orders into our global 3PL network at the start of every shift, prioritized by regional cutoff times

• Enter and verify orders accurately — addresses, SKUs, quantities, shipping methods

• Communicate with warehouses/3PLs about order holds, picking issues, damaged items, missing inventory, and shipment delays

• Track all warehouse issues to resolution and escalate recurring problems with clear documentation

• Update order status and tracking; identify and resolve exceptions (invalid addresses, stock issues, split shipments)

Social Media Management

• Monitor and manage social platforms daily — posting, engagement, comment moderation

• Respond to comments using our brand voice and Response Playbook; flag sensitive or unusual comments for leadership

• Maintain a content calendar and ensure brand voice consistency across channels

• Coordinate post drafts for approval and schedule publishing

Customer Support

• Respond to customer
s and messages using our brand tone (friendly, clear, solution-oriented)

• Troubleshoot delivery status questions, replacement requests, refunds, and missing items

• Escalate sensitive or unusual cases appropriately

Internal Trackers & Data Management

• Maintain and update our internal trackers daily: order status, inventory snapshots, damaged/returned items, and warehouse issue logs

• Keep trackers clean — no duplicate entries, consistent formatting, accurate notes

Operational Reporting

• Build and maintain recurring operational reports from raw data exports (CSV/Excel from sales channels, 3PL portals, internal trackers)

• Reports include: sales/order volume trends, inventory status, damage/return analysis, fulfillment performance, and top recurring issues with recommended fixes

• Clean, normalize, and reconcile data into clear, decision-ready outputs

Logistics Research & Coordination

• Research shipping, logistics, carriers, and regional constraints as needed

• Research new business avenues, emerging trends, and process improvement opportunities

• Provide short written summaries with recommendations

Other Tasks

• General admin tasks as assigned

• Vendor follow-ups, documentation, and information requests

• Help build and improve our SOP/Playbook library



Tools You’ll Use

Smartsheet, WooCommerce, Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, Teams), multiple 3PL portals, Loomly (social media scheduling), Canva or similar creative/design tools, social media platforms 
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X/Twitter), and AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini).



What We’re Looking For

? Extremely high attention to detail — accuracy over speed, every time

? Strong written English — clear, professional, not robotic or overly formal

? Organized and reliable — you manage tasks and follow through without being chased

? Comfortable with trackers, repeatable processes, SOPs, and documentation

? Calm and consistent under pressure — especially with customer-facing communications

? Basic social media literacy — familiar with scheduling tools and content calendars

? Self-starter who can manage multiple workstreams with minimal supervision

? Experience with e-commerce operations, WooCommerce, or order fulfillment is a strong plus

? Smartsheet or advanced Excel proficiency is a strong plus

? Canva or similar design tools for creating social media and marketing content

Bonus: Adobe Illustrator experience is a plus and may qualify for a higher starting rate.



Why Join Us?

• Work directly with the founders — your input matters and is heard

• Be part of a growing global brand with a product people genuinely love

• Clear SOPs and processes — no guesswork, no chaos

• Defined compensation growth path — not vague promises

• Supportive, professional environment that values quality work

• Monday–Friday PH morning schedule (5 AM – 1 PM PHT) — no graveyard shift



How to Apply

We are hiring immediately — the right candidate could start within one week.



Send your application with a short cover letter. In your message, please include:

• A brief summary of your relevant experience

• Which of the responsibilities above you’re most confident in

• Your available working hours and confirmation you can work Monday–Friday, 5 AM–1 PM Philippine Time (Sunday–Thursday US Eastern evenings)

• Your earliest available start date

• *Start your cover letter with the phrase “I read the full JD” so we know you’re paying attention



We review every application carefully and move fast. If you’re the right fit, we’ll be in touch quickly.

title: Ecommerce Video Editor
description:
Hey there, 



We are a growing E-commerce company and we are looking for someone with extensive knowledge in video editing to create video “hooks” for us. If you have a great editing style, a good eye for engaging clips that match our script, and know you can make some really cool edits, we will be hiring a full-time video editor and they will be eligible for large bonuses and a great long-term career.

 

What are we looking for?

1. Able to work with minimal supervision

2. Reliable and have a great work ethic

3. Excellent at finding eye-catching / weird clips that “hook” the viewer

 

How will this job work?

1. We will send you scripts, a voiceover, as well as the link to the specific product

2. You will need to go online and find footage, from TikTok, Youtube
, etc

3. Put them all together with quick cuts to keep viewers engaged, and match the voice over with the captions and video. GET CREATIVE!



These videos are called “hooks” each between 3-10 seconds. They are used as the opening scene for a longer video. It’s very important to use eye-catching clips for the hook to stand out from the crowd and suck the viewer in. A lot of times these clips are very weird/bizzare and make you want to stop and find out what’s going on.

 

Here are 3 example “hook” videos:



 

For interested applicants:



Create 2 mini-hooks of this product, using the script and voiceover linked below:







**VERY IMPORTANT: Please replicate the EXACT STYLE of the hook-videos linked above (the videos will be for
 ads so use the 1:1 aspect ratio)



******KEEP IN MIND: most people will not go through the trouble of creating a video just for a job application, meaning your chance of getting hired is EXTREMELY HIGH! We’re also hiring multiple editors so your chance of getting hired is even higher. I’m personally reviewing every single video that is submitted!

 

Please send the video to 
 along with

 

1. Resume

2. List of audio/video editing software you use.

 

Our current video editor (who is at maximum capacity, made over US$2,500 last month from his salary + bonuses).



Talk soon,

Martin

title: Cedarbrook Homes - Executive Assistant
description:
2026 Cedarbrook Homes - Executive Assistant



About Us

We pay cash for the houses and buy houses in as-is condition. We offer a wide variety of solutions to any real estate problem. We will visit your home for a free 5 minutes walk-through, and then make a fair, market-based offer.



We buy houses from sellers who are looking to sell their home fast for cash. Cedarbrook Homes team can help you sell your house fast no matter where the house is located, no matter its condition. With our ability to directly purchase houses and make cash offers, we create a very quick and hassle-free transaction.



The Opportunity

This is not a traditional administrative role—this is a right-hand operator who will help drive priorities, streamline operations, and ensure the CEO is focused on high-impact work.

title: Expert Full Time Edtior
description:
Video Editor + AI Video Creator — Short-Form Ads

We're a US-based app company running high-volume Meta ad campaigns. We're hiring for two roles in one:



Video Editor — Cut raw UGC creator footage into short-form ads (30–90 sec, vertical). The footage is often shaky, poorly lit, with messy audio. Make it look clean and convert.

AI Video Creator — Generate original video content from scratch using AI tools (Kling, VEO). B-roll, visual hooks, full clips — whatever the brief calls for.



Some days it's all editing. Some days it's all AI generation. Most days it's both. This is direct response advertising and organic tiktok content. These are not cinematic videos or any goofy type editing. These are serious videos.



The Work

Editing side: 50+ ad edits per week. UGC talking heads, exposé/reaction-style content, before/afters, green screens, compilations, and basic motion graphics. Style is TikTok/Reels style.

AI generation side: Create original video content using AI tools based on briefs we provide. This includes generating b-roll, product visuals, scene transitions, full standalone clips, and blending AI footage into real UGC so it looks seamless.



Must-Haves



Weekend availability (Saturday + Sunday required, not optional)

Quick turn arounds

Hands-on experience with AI video tools — you've actually generated and delivered AI video, not just heard of these tools

Can follow a creative brief precisely and d
 what looks best by yourself. we provide scripts, references, and notes

Clear async written communication 
) —  video calls are not required but you must understand english

Reliable computer and internet that handles 1080p without lag



Nice-to-Haves



Experience with direct response / performance marketing ads

Understanding of hooks, pattern interrupts, and pacing for paid social

Basic audio cleanup and color correction

Can blend AI-generated footage with real footage so it doesn't look obviously AI





Pay

Competitive monthly rate paid weekly or biweekly via Paypal. Long-term role, not a one-off project. 



How to Apply

Applications that skip any of these steps will be ignored.



Your subject line must include the word RED.

Answer these four questions in your message (not an attachment):



1) Primary editing software + years of experience?

2) Which AI video tools do you use regularly, and describe one project where you generated AI video for a final deliverable (not just experimented with)?

3) Realistic turnaround time on a 60-second edit?

4) Confirm you can work Saturdays and Sundays.





Send 2–3 short-form ad edits you personally completed (direct links or files, not portfolio sites or showreels). At least one should include AI-generated video. Bonus if you can show raw footage alongside the final edit.



No generic cover letters. Answer the questions and attach your examples please.



What Happens Next

Qualified applicants get a paid test edit with real footage, a brief, and a 4-hour deadline. You get paid regardless of the outcome. We'll also ask for a screenshot of your editing timeline from the test to see your workflow.

Hiring asap.

title: LinkedIn Outreach Specialist — Livestream Platform
description:
We're Effi, a livestream engagement platform that helps organizations running live events get stronger audience participation and better post-event insights. We're hiring 2-3 people for a 30-day paid trial to run LinkedIn outreach on our behalf. The best performers move into a long-term role.



One thing worth knowing upfront

You're not selling a paid product. Effi is currently free to use. Your job is to find the right organizations, reach out, and book a 15-minute intro call with one of our cofounders. No budget conversations, no procurement, no hard sell. You're offering something useful to people who can actually use it.



What you'll do

Your finish line is a booked meeting. Everything before that is your job. Everything after is ours.



Research: Find organizations actively running livestreams with audience interaction — chat, Q&A, polls, live responses. You start with the content, not the person. Find the livestream first, then trace it back to the right contact.



Qualify: Confirm the content meets our criteria before spending time on outreach



Identify the right contact: Communications directors, digital directors, fundraising directors, content leads, livestream producers, event directors, campaign managers — whoever actually owns live content at the org



Outreach: Send a personalized LinkedIn connection request that references something specific about their content. Generic requests don't get approved.



Follow up: After they accept, send a brief message explaining what Effi does and ask for a 15-minute call



Handle responses: Answer basic questions, send follow-up materials by
 if requested, and get the meeting link in front of them



Book the meeting: Send our scheduling link, follow up if needed, and update our CRM once a meeting is confirmed



You'll send approximately 25 connection requests per day. 



What you won't do

- Use automation tools on LinkedIn

- Handle sales conversations or make commitments about the product

- Work from a generic list — research is part of the role



Requirements

- Excellent written English. Professional, warm, not pushy. 

- Comfortable adding Effi as a current role on your existing LinkedIn profile — outreach comes from you as a real member of our team

- Organized and reliable — this role requires a consistent daily cadence

- Prior LinkedIn outreach or business development experience



What we provide

- An Effi
 address 

- Message templates and qualifying criteria

- A simple daily tracking sheet

- CRM access for logging booked meetings

title: Assistant: Content Creation & Affiliate Marketing
description:

Strong SEO knowledge (keyword research, on-page optimization, internal linking)

Experience managing paid ad campaigns with measurable ROI

Basic to intermediate video editing skills

IDEAL CANDIDATE:

title: Senior Full Stack Developer and Technical Project Lead
description:
This is a senior role. 



We are looking for someone who can:

-Run a project independently from kickoff to delivery, without being managed

-Organize deliverables, set milestones, and keep work on track without being reminded

-Follow up with clients on contracts, approvals, and open items professionally

-Build the actual system, not just manage the people who do



If you need someone else to organize your work or follow up on your behalf, this role is not the right fit.



Who we are:

Acore Technology is a business technology and ERP solutions firm. We help product-oriented companies scale, reduce operational friction, and grow without unnecessary complexity. We build custom ERP systems, workflow automation, cloud-native solutions, data reporting tools, and bespoke applications that replace manual processes. Every system is built exactly the way a client needs it.



What you will do:

-Manage projects end to end

-You take a client requirement and own it completely. Scope the work, break it into milestones, assign priorities, track progress, and deliver on time. No one will be managing the project for you.

-Organize and track deliverables

-Keep all project deliverables structured and visible. Know what is done, what is in progress, and what is at risk at any given time. Surface issues before they become problems.

-Follow up with clients on contracts and approvals

-You are the direct point of contact. Send status updates, follow up on unsigned contracts, chase approvals, manage scope change requests, and keep the client relationship in good standing throughout the engagement.

-Build full stack systems

-Design and build reliable backends, clean UIs, and secure APIs. Integrate ERPs, e-commerce platforms, inventory systems, and third-party data sources into cohesive workflows.

-Automate manual workflows

-Identify where clients are doing things manually that should be automated, and build the systems that fix it.

-Use AI development tools daily



We use Claude Code, Codex, and similar tools as standard practice. You are expected to use them to move faster and build better, while applying strong engineering judgment throughout.



What we are looking for:

-Strong full stack skills across backend, frontend, APIs, and databases

-Proven ability to manage projects, organize deliverables, and hit deadlines without supervision

-Experience managing client relationships, including contract follow-ups, approvals, and scope discussions

-Experience building integrations across APIs, webhooks, and third-party platforms

-Hands-on with AI-assisted development tools as part of a real daily workflow

-Communicates clearly with both technical and non-technical people



We care more about judgment and the quality of your thinking than years on a resume.



Hiring process

01 - Application review

02 - Technical assessment using a real-world problem, not trivia or algorithmic puzzles

03 - Discussion of your approach, how you thought through the problem, and how you would manage the project and the client

04 - Final interview



Compensation

Competitive salary based on experience, with higher compensation for candidates with strong AI development skills. Performance-linked growth, high ownership over architecture and client engagements, and a small team where what you contribute defines your opportunity.

title: WordPress Developer — Reverse Proxy Blog Migration
description:
WordPress Developer — Reverse Proxy Blog Migration

Squarespace to WordPress on WP Engine

Overview

We need an experienced WordPress developer to migrate a blog (~850 pages) from Squarespace to WordPress on WP Engine. The main website stays on Squarespace — only the blog moves. A Cloudflare Worker reverse proxy will route blog traffic (/blog/*) to WordPress while all other traffic continues to Squarespace. All existing blog URLs must remain identical after migration.

This is not a standard WordPress build. The reverse proxy routing is the core technical challenge.

Scope of Work

1. WP Engine Setup. Provision WordPress environment, configure theme, install required plugins. Set up permalink structure to match existing blog URLs exactly. The site has two URL patterns: flat slugs (/blog/post-slug) and date-based paths (/blog/2024/10/19/post-slug). Both must resolve correctly.

2. Content Migration. Export content from Squarespace (WXR format), import into WordPress. Write and run scripts to download all images from Squarespace’s CDN, upload to WordPress media library, and rewrite all image URLs in post content. Verify all 850+ post slugs match the originals.

3. Cloudflare Worker & DNS. Move domain nameservers to Cloudflare. Write and deploy a Cloudflare Worker that routes /blog/* requests to WP Engine and passes all other requests through to Squarespace. Configure proper Host headers, X-Forwarded-Proto, and SSL end-to-end.

4. WordPress Proxy Configuration. Configure 
p for reverse proxy operation (WP_HOME, WP_SITEURL, forwarded headers). Ensure WordPress generates correct URLs through the proxy. No redirect loops, no mixed content.

5. URL Verification & QA. Verify every migrated URL returns HTTP 200 through the proxy. Test for redirect loops, broken images, mixed content warnings, and correct canonical URLs. Deliver a QA report covering all pages.

Required Experience

•  Cloudflare Workers — you’ve written and deployed them before, not just used Cloudflare for DNS

•  Reverse proxy configuration — routing subdirectory traffic to a different origin server

•  WP Engine hosting — familiar with their portal, domain config, caching, and SFTP/SSH access

•  WordPress 
p for proxy setups — forwarded headers, WP_HOME vs WP_SITEURL

•  Large-scale content migration — 850+ pages including scripted image re-hosting

•  SSL/HTTPS configuration across proxied setups

•  WP-CLI proficiency

Project Details

Budget: $1,500–$2,500 fixed price (open to discussion based on experience)

Timeline: 3–4 weeks

Type: Contract / project-based, with potential for ongoing WordPress maintenance

Communication: Async via Slack or
. Weekly progress updates. You’ll work directly with our SEO lead who will provide technical direction and review work at each phase.



To Apply

Please include:

1. A specific example of a reverse proxy or Cloudflare Worker project you’ve completed. Describe the setup, not just “I’ve done it.”

2. A specific example of a large content migration (100+ pages), ideally Squarespace to WordPress.

3. Your availability to start and estimated completion timeline.

4. Your fixed-price quote for the full scope described above.

title: Local SEO Specialist - With AI
description:
Local SEO Specialist (MUST HAVE AI AUTOMATION SKILLS IN LOCAL SEO)

Full-Time - Makarios Marketing | [Remote]



About the Role

We're not looking for a traditional SEO hire. We're looking for a rare hybrid: someone who lives and breathes local SEO and thinks like an AI engineer. You'll be responsible for delivering measurable search results for our clients while simultaneously building the tools, agents, and automations that put us years ahead of the competition.

If you've ever thought, "I could automate this with an agent," while doing SEO work — this role was written for you.



Read this entire post before applying. We mean it.

Most SEO job posts get flooded with copy-paste applications from people who skimmed the title. This isn't that kind of job, and we're not that kind of company. If you're looking for a basic SEO role where you build a few links and write some meta descriptions, please move on. This role will frustrate you.

If you're someone who loses sleep thinking about why a map pack result is where it is, and you've ever opened n8n or Claude Code just because you were curious — keep reading.



Who We Are

We're a results-driven SEO company that doesn't just execute strategies — we build the tools and systems that make those strategies unstoppable. We work in local SEO and we take it seriously. We're growing and we need someone who can grow with us, contribute ideas from day one, and help us deliver things to clients that no one else in the market is offering.



What This Role Actually Is

You will own local SEO strategy and execution across client accounts and you will build AI-powered tools and automations that make our work faster, smarter, and more valuable. These two responsibilities are equally important. You can't do one without the other here.

This is not a junior role. This is not a "we'll train you on AI" role. You need to come in already capable.



Your Day-to-Day Responsibilities



Build and execute deep local SEO strategies — Google Business Profile, map pack optimization, local citations, geo-targeted content, and local link building

Identify automation opportunities in our SEO workflows and build agents using Claude Code and n8n to handle them

Create custom client-facing tools and reporting dashboards that go beyond anything a standard SEO platform offers

Manage technical SEO audits, on-page optimization, and content strategy across multiple client sites

Design and run link building campaigns that prioritize local authority and genuine relevance

Monitor algorithm changes and translate them into concrete strategy shifts before clients even notice an impact

Bring new ideas to the table — if you see a smarter way to do something, we want to hear it





You Are Exactly Who We Need If:



You have deep, real-world local SEO experience — you know how the local algorithm works, you've ranked businesses in competitive markets, and you can explain why something works, not just that it does

You've built workflows or automations in n8n — not watched a tutorial, actually built something

You've used Claude Code to build or deploy AI agents in a real context

You've worked with OpenClaw or similar AI platforms to extend what's possible

You can write enough code (Python, JavaScript, or similar) to build tools that actually work

You've managed SEO across multiple client accounts simultaneously

You think in systems — you see every repetitive task as a future automation

You communicate clearly in written English with clients and teammates





You Are Not Who We Need If:



Your experience is mostly on-page basics and you've never touched automation

You've "heard of" n8n or Claude Code but never opened them

You apply to every job posting with the same template message

You need hand-holding to figure out what to prioritize

You're looking for a role you can coast in

You've done some SEO, but never specialized in just that



We will not respond to generic applications. If your opening message doesn't show us you read this post, it goes straight to the archive. Tell us why you stand out, what you bring, how you will stand out from others. We get tons of applications. STAND OUT



Include code SEO 26 somewhere in your application — this tells us you read everything and follow instructions, two things that are non-negotiable in this role



What We Offer



Full-time, long-term position — we're not looking for a short contract, we're looking for someone to grow with us

Bonuses for performance as well as paid trainings and courses you need or want

Competitive monthly salary based on your experience and skills

Full access to the tools you need — AI platforms, SEO software, automation tools

Real creative freedom — if you have an idea for a tool or system, you can build it

A team that actually values what you bring and won't micromanage how you do it





How to Apply

Send your application and include all of the following or it will not be considered:



A specific example of a local SEO win you're proud of — what was the situation, what did you do, what happened

One automation or AI tool you've built — describe what it does and what you used to build it



Share documents, agents, work you've done that is relevant



Applications without all three of the above will not receive a response. No exceptions.



This role is for the person who sees a gap in what's possible and immediately starts thinking about how to close it. If that's you, we'd love to hear from you.



Monthly - $
USD for 40 hours a week (negotiable on experience)

Must be willing to work 9am - 5pm EST

	•	Recruiting operations

	•	Client acquisition and closing

	•	Workflow structure and team accountability

Business Areas You Will Lead



Commercial Services

Staffing Division

You will also drive client acquisition activity within the staffing division.





Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



You must have hands-on experience with:

	•	Training or managing recruiters/support staff



Applicants without both ATS + GHL experience will not be considered.





Who You Are

	•	Highly organized and execution-focused

	•	Strong closer with confidence in client conversations

	•	Process-driven with attention to detail

	•	Able to manage multiple workflows without losing control

	•	Comfortable enforcing structure and accountability

Systems Required

	•	Google Workspace

	•	Microsoft Office



Preferred:

	•	Automation tools

	•	Reporting dashboards

	•	Process documentation systems





Performance Metrics



You will be measured on:

	•	Pipeline movement and conversion rates

	•	Client call booking and closing performance

	•	Onboarding completion and compliance accuracy

	•	CRM and ATS data integrity

	•	Recruiter productivity and adherence to process

	•	Responsiveness and execution speed





Work Requirements

	•	Full-time (40 hours/week)

	•	Available during EST business hours

	•	Weekly leadership reporting required

	•	Time tracking required





Compensation

	•	Base: $800/month

	•	Paid weekly

	•	Performance bonuses tied to:

	•	Closures and revenue contribution

	•	KPI improvement

	•	Pipeline management

	•	Onboarding completion

	•	CRM/ATS accuracy

	•	Team execution and structure





To Apply (Required)



Submit all 3:



1. Video Introduction (2–4 minutes)



Cover:

2. Resume



Must show recruiting, operations, or staffing experience



3. Systems List



List all ATS, CRM, HR, automation, and reporting tools used





Summary



We are hiring a high-accountability Talent Operations & Staffing Growth Lead who can run operations, drive client acquisition, and improve performance metrics.



This role is for someone who can:

title: Social Media Growth & funnel Brand Systems Manager (Performance-Based Role)
description:
Growth Content + Funnel + Website Specialist (B2B)



We are a U.S.-based service company expanding across multiple states. We are not hiring someone to “just post.” We are hiring someone to help us grow.



We want measurable brand growth, increased visibility, and inbound leads.

This role is for someone who understands how content drives authority, conversions, and revenue.



Compensation

Schedule

Objective of This Role



Increase brand visibility, engagement, and inbound leads through structured, professional content plus funnel and website execution.

title: REMOTE OPERATIONS DIRECTOR  (GoHighLevel + Cleaning/Janitorial / Facility Operations Background Required)
description:
REMOTE OPERATIONS DIRECTOR



(Executive-Level | GoHighLevel + Automation Systems + Commercial Cleaning / Facility Operations Required)



Schedule: Monday–Thursday | 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST

Type: Full-Time | Long-Term

Tracking: TimeProof required during all working hours





ROLE OVERVIEW



We are hiring a Remote Operations Director to take full ownership of execution, systems, team performance, and profitability across Sales Support, Marketing Systems, and Operations.



This is an executive operations role—not a task-based VA position.



You will be responsible for:

	•	Building and enforcing structure

	•	Managing people and performance

	•	Designing and maintaining automation systems

	•	Ensuring the company operates efficiently, predictably, and profitably



You will serve as the operational bridge between:

	•	Cold Callers / SDRs

	•	Marketing

	•	Estimating

	•	Field Operations



You own outcomes, not activity.





CRITICAL REQUIREMENT (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



You must know how to personally build, implement, and troubleshoot automation systems.



This is not a “manage a developer” role.



You are expected to:

	•	Build workflows yourself

	•	Fix issues yourself

	•	Improve systems continuously





PRIOR EXECUTIVE EXPERIENCE (REQUIRED)



This role requires prior senior leadership experience, such as:

	•	Operations Director

	•	Head of Operations

	•	Senior Operations Manager

	•	Business Operations Lead

	•	COO / Deputy Operations



You must demonstrate measurable improvements in:

	•	Organization

	•	Profitability

	•	Team performance

	•	Systems efficiency

	•	Revenue or contract growth





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1) KPI OWNERSHIP & EXECUTION

	•	Own company KPIs across:

	•	Sales

	•	Marketing

	•	Operations

	•	Run structured weekly performance meetings

	•	Identify bottlenecks and underperformance

	•	Take immediate corrective action

	•	Deliver executive KPI reports including:

	•	Metrics

	•	Gaps

	•	Root causes

	•	Action plans





2) OPERATIONS, SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION (BUILD + OWN)



You are responsible for the entire automation and systems infrastructure.



Platforms include:

	•	GoHighLevel

	•	Zapier

	•	Additional tools such as Make (formerly Integromat) or n8n (strongly preferred)





You will:



BUILD (Hands-On)

	•	Design and build automation workflows from scratch

	•	Create multi-step logic including:

	•	Filters

	•	Paths

	•	Conditions

	•	Webhooks

	•	Build lead routing, tagging, and assignment systems

	•	Build follow-up automation 
, SMS, tasking)

	•	Build deduplication logic before CRM entry





MANAGE & OPTIMIZE

	•	Maintain and improve all workflows

	•	Monitor for failures, delays, and data issues

	•	Optimize for:

	•	Speed

	•	Accuracy

	•	Cost efficiency

	•	Eliminate manual work wherever possible





SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE

	•	Design scalable systems that support:

	•	High-volume lead flow

	•	Multi-location operations

	•	Multiple service lines (cleaning + staffing)

	•	Ensure all systems are:

	•	Documented

	•	Reliable

	•	Easy for the team to follow





TROUBLESHOOTING (CRITICAL)

	•	Identify and fix:

	•	Broken automations

	•	Missing leads

	•	Duplicate data

	•	Sync issues

	•	Implement backup logic and fail-safes





3) TEAM MANAGEMENT & ACCOUNTABILITY

	•	Oversee remote team execution (4–10+ tea
mbers)

	•	Assign tasks and enforce deadlines

	•	Verify completion and output quality

	•	Run daily and weekly check-ins

	•	Maintain performance tracking and documentation



You are not the follow-up person you ensure follow-up happens.





4) PROPOSAL COORDINATION & SUBMISSION



(Not Full Estimating)

	•	Coordinate with estimators to ensure proposals are:

	•	Accurate

	•	Complete

	•	On-time

	•	Professionally packaged

	•	Review:

	•	Scope

	•	Pricing summaries

	•	Compliance documents

	•	Manage:

	•	RFPs

	•	Bid submissions

	•	Vendor portals

	•	Maintain organized records:

	•	COIs

	•	Safety documents

	•	Contracts



5) MARKETING & LEAD FOLLOW-THROUGH

	•	Own all lead follow-up systems inside GHL

	•	Ensure:

	•	No lead is missed

	•	No pipeline is stagnant

	•	Monitor:

	•	Speed to lead

	•	Follow-up compliance

	•	Conversion rates

	•	Ensure all inbound and outbound systems are connected and functioning





6) ADMINISTRATIVE, COMPLIANCE & FINANCIAL SUPPORT

	•	Maintain vendor registrations and compliance deadlines

	•	Track invoicing, payments, and cost summaries

	•	Ensure all submissions are accurate and on time





REQUIRED EXPERIENCE & SKILLS

	•	Advanced experience with GoHighLevel

	•	Strong hands-on experience with Zapier (multi-step workflows, paths, webhooks)

	•	Experience building automation systems (not just using templates)

	•	Experience with Make or n8n (preferred)

	•	Experience with CRM + automation integration across multiple tools

	•	Commercial cleaning, janitorial, facility services, or construction admin background

	•	Proven remote team leadership

	•	Strong organizational and execution skills

	•	Executive-level communication





NOT A FIT IF

	•	You have only used Zapier for basic automations

	•	You cannot build workflows from scratch

	•	You rely fully on developers for technical setup

	•	You do not understand webhooks or data flow

	•	You prefer task-based work vs ownership





FIRST 90-DAY PERFORMANCE METRICS

	•	Fully built and documented automation systems (GHL + Zapier + integrations)

	•	Zero critical lead loss or automation failure

	•	Weekly KPI reporting across all departments

	•	Minimum 5 active proposals submitted weekly

	•	Measurable improvement in:

	•	Lead response time

	•	Pipeline movement

	•	Conversion rates

	•	Documented system improvements and efficiencies





REQUIRED APPLICATION SUBMISSIONS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



1) VIDEO (5–10 MINUTES)



Explain:

	•	Your executive operations experience

	•	How you improved systems and profitability

	•	How you manage teams and accountability





2) 30–60–90 DAY PLAN



Provide:

	•	How you will organize operations

	•	How you will improve systems and automation

	•	How you will measure success





3) PROOF OF RESULTS

	•	Metrics, case studies, or screenshots showing impact





4) AUTOMATION SYSTEM BREAKDOWN (MANDATORY)



Show a real system you built:



Include:

	•	Lead flow (source ? processing ? CRM ? follow-up)

	•	Tools used

	•	Logic structure

	•	How you handled:

	•	Duplicates

	•	Errors

	•	Delays



If you cannot show this, do not apply.



COMPENSATION & GROWTH

	•	Competitive monthly compensation

	•	Performance-based bonuses tied to KPIs

	•	Growth path toward Senior Operations / COO-level leadership







FINAL POSITIONING

title: E-commerce Brand Manager
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.



Ready to Lead and Scale Our E-Commerce Operations?



At Hadley Designs, we believe learning should be enjoyable, engaging, and screen-free. Millions of parents and educators trust our beautifully designed, developmentally aligned educational tools to help children grow and thrive. As a fast-growing, family-founded brand, we are on a mission to make learning meaningful for families around the world.



We are looking for an E-Commerce Business Manager to join our team and help scale our online sales. If you are a results-driven operator with a passion for building scalable e-commerce systems, optimizing performance, and driving growth through data-backed strategies, this is a unique opportunity to make an impact.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is redefining early education with creativity, heart, and purpose. Every product we create is hand-drawn and teacher-designed, crafted with care to build confidence and connection. Our screen-free tools empower families and teachers to make learning fun and meaningful, nurturing curiosity and creativity in children.



Our Mission

We design screen-free products that parents trust to help their children grow, learn, and reach their full potential. Our beautifully crafted, developmentally sound tools replace distractions with connection, curiosity, and real learning.



Our Vision

We aim to build the most trusted children’s brand in the world, present in millions of homes, reshaping how families learn, connect, and grow. Our products will be so widely used and passed down that generations of children will grow up learning from them and choose them again for their own families.



Role Overview

As the E-Commerce Business Manager, you will own the full P&L of Hadley Designs’ e-commerce operations, with a focus on growing our Amazon business and expanding our multi-channel online presence. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, optimizing product positioning, managing pricing, and leading promotional strategies across multiple online platforms. This is a high-impact role where your strategic and operational expertise will be critical to scaling the business and ensuring the long-term success of our e-commerce channels.



Key Responsibilities

-End-to-End E-Commerce Ownership: Manage all aspects of the e-commerce business, including revenue growth, margin optimization, pricing, advertising, and inventory management.

-Performance Optimization: Continuously optimize product listings, content, pricing strategies, and promotional plans to maximize conversion rates, sales, and profitability.

-New Product and Category Growth: Identify new product opportunities and market expansion avenues, and collaborate with internal teams to bring them to market successfully.

-Inventory and Demand Planning: Develop and execute plans to manage product demand, inventory levels, and risk mitigation, ensuring smooth and cost-effective operations.

-Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Product Operations, Supply Chain, and Design teams to ensure product availability and accurate messaging across channels.

-Data-Driven Strategy: Use data to guide decision-making, refine strategies, and improve key performance metrics across e-commerce platforms.



How Success is Measured

-Strong growth in online sales and profitability across multiple platforms, especially Amazon.

-Clear and predictable performance improvements through optimized strategies in pricing, promotions, and product listings.

-Consistent execution of marketing and sales strategies to expand market share.

-Efficient inventory management that balances growth with cost control.

-Cross-functional alignment that contributes to operational efficiency and scalability.



Requirements

Who You Are

You are a growth-oriented, highly analytical e-commerce operator who thrives on taking ownership and driving measurable outcomes. You have experience working with e-commerce platforms like Amazon and are excited to scale a high-growth business within a collaborative and performance-driven environment.



You Have:



-5+ years of experience managing e-commerce operations, preferably with Amazon Seller Central or similar platforms.

-A proven track record of growing revenue, improving profitability, and optimizing sales across e-commerce platforms.

-Strong analytical skills and the ability to use data to make decisions and improve performance.

-Experience in managing product positioning, pricing strategies, and marketing campaigns.

-A collaborative, results-driven mindset and a passion for continuous improvement.

-Ability to manage both strategic and tactical elements of e-commerce operations.



Benefits

Why You’ll Love Working Here

-Impact: Your work will directly influence how families experience learning through the Hadley Designs brand.

-Culture: Join a passionate, mission-driven team that values trust, creativity, and collaboration.

-Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of a remote-first role with flexible working hours.

-Benefits:

Remote-first work environment

Paid time off and holidays

Access to learning resources and professional development

Free access to Hadley Designs products

Regular interaction with leadership, including the CEO and CMO

Stability from a decade as a family-founded, mission-driven brand



Apply Today

If you’re ready to help shape the future of learning in a growing company, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now to join the Hadley Designs team as our E-Commerce Business Manager and help us create a lasting impact on families, educators, and children worldwide.



P.S. If you don’t hear from us within 4 weeks of your application, please consider that we’ve d
 to move forward with other candidates. However, we truly appreciate your interest in Hadley Designs!



To formally apply here :

title: TikTok Shop & E-Commerce Lead
description:
Company Description



At Earthside Farms, we are dedicated to creating snacks that are healthy, wholesome, and delicious. Our vegan and sugar-free snack range is crafted using natural, nutrient-rich ingredients to support a healthier lifestyle. We aim to inspire individuals to make mindful and nutritious food choices without compromising on taste. With a focus on providing satisfying snacking experiences, we are committed to reshaping the way people think about healthy eating.



Overview



We are looking for someone to own and scale our TikTok Shop and broader e-commerce ecosystem. This includes Shopify, TikTok Shop, Amazon, 
, Faire, and other e-commerce wholesale platforms.



This is a senior, execution-focused role. We are not looking for someone to learn TikTok on the job. You must come in as a TikTok expert with a proven track record of driving revenue, and then extend that expertise across other channels.



Responsibilities:

- Own TikTok Shop end-to-end, including product listings, pricing, promotions, creator strategy, and storefront management

- Drive revenue through TikTok Shop via both organic content and paid ads

- Manage and scale creator and affiliate programs with a clear focus on sales, not just content output

- Launch, manage, and optimize paid advertising across TikTok, Amazon, Walmart Marketplace, Google Adwords, and other relevant channels

- Expand learnings from TikTok into Shopify, Amazon, 
, Faire, and wholesale platforms

- Optimize product listings across all platforms for conversion and discoverability

- Monitor and improve key metrics including conversion rate, AOV, CAC, and ROAS

- Identify opportunities for bundling, merchandising, and pricing optimization

- Manage inventory flow across channels to prevent stockouts and overages

- Analyze performance data and provide clear, actionable recommendations



Requirements:

- Proven track record managing TikTok Shop with measurable revenue results

- Deep expertise in TikTok, including content strategy, creator management, affiliate programs, and paid ads

- Hands-on experience scaling TikTok Shop from early stage to meaningful revenue

- Experience managing at least one additional platform such as Amazon or Walmart Marketplace

- Strong performance marketing background with direct experience running paid ads

- Data-driven with the ability to make fast decisions and iterate quickly

- Comfortable operating in a fast-paced environment without established processes

- Strong ownership mentality with accountability for results



What Success Looks Like:

- TikTok Shop becomes a meaningful and growing revenue channel

- Consistent improvement in ROAS, CAC, and conversion rates

- Reliable creator and affiliate engine that drives predictable sales

- Expansion of successful TikTok strategies into other e-commerce channels

- Clear reporting with insights that directly improve performance

title: Capcut Editor For Real Estate Videos
description:
Looking for someone to create short form content for instagram and
. 20-30 second reels, some shorter ones for teasers. Important: you should be working from a device that can handle the large video sizes that you have to download from our google drive in order to import into capcut. If you have poor internet connection, slow device, or other limiting factors, we respectfully ask you not to apply. We have short deadlines and need quick turnaround (12-24 hours). Hourly wage for the time you are editing, but we do not pay for the time it takes to download and upload videos as this varies based on your internet and device, so you must track your hours using our spreadsheet so we can pay you.



We are a busy real estate team and have a lot of content to create. We upload the video to google drive, organized by address, and you download the files and edit into a reel. You then upload the video to google drive and share the link with us. We go over the video together and then you make any necessary changes.



You don't have to have a background in real estate videos, but it is preferred. Capcut experience is required, and a 30 second reel should take between 30-45 minutes to produce on average. We have a training video that shows our workflow and style, as well as the necessary fonts and methods to create videos curated to our brand. We provide capcut pro and canva pro access.

title: Operations / Membership & Finance Assistant
description:
About HAFA: 

Health Agents for America (HAFA) is a national trade association representing independent health insurance agents and brokers across all 50 states. HAFA is committed to advocacy, education, and protecting both agents and the consumers they serve. We are a fast-moving, mission-driven organization led by a passionate team dedicated to making real change in the healthcare and insurance landscape.



Job Overview:

We are looking for a detail-oriented Remote Operations / Membership & Finance Assistant to support our membership and financial processes.



This role focuses on invoicing, payment tracking, and membership management using QuickBooks, along with
 and administrative support.



This role is perfect for someone who enjoys working with numbers, tracking details, and ensuring everything is accurate and up to date.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Membership & Financial Operations (QuickBooks)

     - Set up new members in QuickBooks and internal systems

     - Invoice new members and process monthly renewal invoices

     - Track failed payments for new setups and renewals; follow up as needed

     - Send past due notices and maintain accurate payment records



2. Membership & Operations Support

     - Assist in maintaining the HAFA member directory and internal systems

     - Support onboarding processes and respond to membership inquiries 
)

     - Help manage internal projects, timelines, and follow-ups

     - Assist with day-to-day operational tasks as needed

     - Ensure accuracy and organization across all records and systems 



Must-Have Requirements:

- Hands-on experience with QuickBooks (REQUIRED)

- Experience with invoicing, billing, or bookkeeping support

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy

- Good written communication (for payment follow-ups)

- Organized and consistent with task completion



Qualifications & Skills:

- Problem-solver with a “figure it out” mindset 

- Proven QuickBooks experience (required)

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy

- Experience with invoicing, billing, and payment follow-ups

- Proficiency in Excel or similar tools

- Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently

- Passion for advocacy, healthcare, or supporting small businesses is a plus 



Nice to Have:

- Experience with membership-based organizations

- Experience supporting executives or leadership teams



Outcome / Success Metrics:

100?curacy in invoicing and membership records

Timely follow-up on failed or past due payments

Event-related financials and logistics handled efficiently

Smooth onboarding and operational processes 



Work Setup:

Remote (work from home)

Long-term role

Scheduled hours aligned with U.S. Central Time



Compensation:

$3 to $5 per hour (based on experience)



IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY):

To be considered, include:

2. Short answers:

Why Join Us?

At HAFA, you are not just filling a role, you are part of a movement. You will work directly with leadership, gain exposure to national advocacy efforts, and play a key role in supporting independent agents across the country.

title: Meticulous UX Designer
description:
Are you obsessed with how designs look and feel? Do you believe great design can change lives? Let’s team up.



We believe in people. This is why we only work with clients who serve people. From firefighters, to law firms, to suppliers sending life-saving food to kids dying of malnutrition, the work you do will help make the world a better place.



Our team is made up of people who want to do the best work of their life. People who love to learn, challenge themselves, grow and have some fun along the journey. We also care about each other – we support each other in our own personal goals and vision. We are human beings before employees and we love to bring out the best in each other.



Now, ready to learn more about this opening? Buckle up.



If you work here, you’ll:

- Be challenged to do the best work of your life in a supportive environment.

- Become the best communicator you can become (this is the most important thing we do).

- Have the space to ask questions, voice your feedback, and make a difference.

- Help shape the design of our products from the ground up, participating in stimulating conversations with like-minded people.



What you could be working on:

- Designing intuitive, scalable interfaces for that solve real problems.

- Turning rough ideas, feedback notes, or “brain dumps” into clear user flows, wireframes and mockups that tell a story from start to finish.

- Building and maintaining a thoughtful design system that keeps our tools consistent, accessible, and efficient 

- Working closely with developers throughout implementation, reviewing builds, and fine-tuning details to make sure the final output matches the design intent.

- Refining the small details that elevate the experience, including micro-interactions, states (hover, active, error, empty), spacing, iconography, and motion.

- Simplifying complex workflows by breaking them into logical, digestible steps and removing unnecessary friction wherever possible.

- Contributing to product discussions early by challenging assumptions, suggesting alternative approaches, and advocating for the user perspective.

- Supporting clear design handoffs with well-organized files, annotated flows, and defined components so the team can build efficiently.



You’ll do well in this job if you:

- Bring at least 3 years of experience with building designs and UX

- Have a strong sense of visual design, always putting usability first. You obsess about how design looks, and you care even more about how they work.

- Communicate clearly and confidently in English, and can walk others through the reasoning behind your design decisions. You don’t just say what looks better, you explain why it solves the problem.

- Enjoy exploring new tools and improving your workflow, whether that’s Figma or anything else that helps you do better work. - You’re naturally helpful and like making collaboration easier for everyone.

- Have clear opinions on best practices, but stay open to feedback. You’re confident in your thinking, yet flexible enough to test, refine, and evolve your ideas.

- Have the persistence to push for a better user experience, even when it takes extra effort. You don’t settle for “good enough” if you know it can be improved.

- Pay close attention to detail. If something is slightly misaligned or inconsistent, you notice it and fix it.

- Can take a rough collection of ideas and turn it into a clear, structured, and polished layout independently. You’re comfortable shaping ambiguity into something concrete.

- Are okay with healthy debate. If something doesn’t serve the user, you’re willing to say so and back it up with solid reasoning.

- Take ownership of handoffs. Your files are clean, layers are organized, and notes are clear so developers and teammates can move quickly without guesswork.

- Approach problems with curiosity. If a button isn’t being clicked or a form isn’t being completed, you want to dig in and understand what’s really going on.



You probably shouldn’t apply if:

- You’re “just looking for extra money.”

- You like working 5 full-time jobs because all you care about is work.

- You get offended easily and take things personally.

- You are not someone with grit and determination who can persevere while being challenged to do great work.

- You get overwhelmed easily, new habits, new learnings and chat messages.



The interview process:

- Since 99% of our work is done via Slack (we don’t do scheduled calls), the entire interview process will be via
. (With lots of questions, sprinkled with a few voice notes)



If you work here:

- You’ll get 13th month salary, Filipino holidays, unlimited time off (we don’t count sick days), a normal working day schedule (no night shifts, although an early start is preferred for time overlap) with some flexibility, a week off during the holidays in December, and the opportunity to grow and become your best self.



A little more about us:

- We’ve been in business for a decade+. Our teams are remote (mostly in the Philippines). Our longest standing tea
mber has been with us for over 14+ years. We've had people quit smoking on our teams with our help, lose weight, learn a new instrument, speak a new language, and more. We all love what we do.



How to begin:

- Your mission, should you choose to accept, is to send us an
 with 3 questions you have about this role. If you’re currently in a full-time role and are looking for something new, we’re open to a transition window. We actually care about your happiness.



NOTE: While we like AI, and we use it in certain circumstances, we ask that no AI be used during communication. Communication is the most important thing we do. If I don't see your natural voice from our first interaction, then you're setting an inaccurate representation of who you are and how you communicate. And when I see that change, it's going to come across as a lack of harmony in how you communicate.

High attention to detail and accuracy



Ability to remain calm, professional, and solution-oriented in high-volume call environments

 Management

s into MyCase

Personal Injury

title: Customer Service Representative (AMS 360)
description:
We're looking for a Customer Service Representative with hands-on experience in AMS 360 to support an insurance-focused client operation. This is a client-facing role where accuracy, responsiveness, and system fluency matter. You will handle inbound customer inquiries, manage policy-related requests, and navigate AMS 360 to keep records accurate and service moving without delays.



If you have worked in an insurance agency environment, know your way around AMS 360, and take pride in delivering clear and professional customer support, this role is a strong fit.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Stable, client-facing role with clear ownership over customer interactions

- Direct impact on client satisfaction and retention



What You'll Work On



Customer Support and Communication



- Handle inbound customer inquiries via phone,
, or chat professionally and promptly

- Resolve customer issues, answer policy-related questions, and escalate complex cases as needed

- Follow up on open items and ensure every customer interaction is closed properly

- Maintain a professional, clear, and empathetic communication style across all channels



AMS 360 System Management



- Navigate AMS 360 to access, update, and manage customer and policy records accurately

- Process policy changes, endorsements, renewals, and cancellations within the system

- Ensure data integrity across all records and flag discrepancies for review

- Generate reports and pull information from AMS 360 to support internal and client needs



Administrative and Operations Support



- Maintain organized records and documentation for all customer interactions

- Support internal teams with data entry, record updates, and workflow coordination

- Identify recurring customer issues and surface them to the team for process improvement



What You Bring



- Proven experience working with AMS 360 in a professional capacity

- Background in insurance agency operations, customer service, or a related field

- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English

- High attention to detail and accuracy in data entry and record management

- Organized, self-sufficient, and comfortable managing multiple open cases simultaneously

- Comfortable working fully remotely with minimal oversight



Nice to Have



- Experience in a licensed insurance agency or brokerage environment

- Familiarity with insurance policy types including personal lines, commercial lines, or benefits

- Experience with other agency management systems alongside AMS 360



How to Apply
