title: Bilingual Administrative Assistant (Cantonese/Mandarin)
description:
We're looking for a bilingual Admin Assistant who is fluent in English and Cantonese or Mandarin to support a boutique law firm based in California, serving clients throughout the San Francisco Bay Area. The firm practices family law, employment law, and civil rights, and roughly half of its clients are Chinese-speaking. This role exists to make sure those clients are never left without clear, accurate communication at any point in their experience with the firm.



The split is approximately 30% live interpretation and translation, 70?ministrative support. You do not need a legal background. You do need to be sharp, dependable, and comfortable switching between languages in real client-facing situations.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Up to **14 days** of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you’re most productive

- Direct involvement in meaningful legal matters that affect real people

- Small team environment where your work has immediate visibility and impact



## What You'll Work On



**Interpretation and Translation**



- Provide live interpretation between English and Cantonese or Mandarin during client calls, consultations, and case discussions

- Translate written documents,
s, and client-facing materials as needed

- Ensure accuracy and tone are preserved across both languages in sensitive legal contexts

- Serve as a communication bridge between the legal team and Chinese-speaking clients

- Step in for interpretation support on short notice when client needs arise



**Administrative Support**



- Handle data entry, document management, and file organization across firm systems

- Assist with basic bookkeeping tasks including expense tracking and invoice logging

- Draft, review, and respond to
s on behalf of the team as directed

- Support day-to-day operations across scheduling, client follow-ups, and internal coordination

- Maintain organized records with attention to detail and confidentiality



**Marketing Support (Nice to Have)**



- Assist with social media posting, content scheduling, or basic digital marketing tasks

- Help draft client-facing communications or update website copy when needed

- Support any outreach or visibility initiatives the firm pursues



## What You Bring



- Full professional fluency in English and Cantonese or Mandarin, written and spoken

- Cantonese fluency is strongly preferred, as most Cantonese speakers also speak Mandarin

- Prior experience in an administrative, legal, or client-facing support role

- Comfort handling live interpretation in professional or high-stakes conversations

- Strong written communication skills in both English and Chinese

- Proficiency in standard productivity tools including
, spreadsheets, and document management platforms

- High attention to detail and a strong sense of confidentiality

- Ability to manage shifting priorities in a small, fast-moving team



## Nice to Have



- Background in legal, paralegal, or professional services environments

- Basic bookkeeping or accounting experience

- Experience with any legal practice management software

- Social media or digital marketing skills



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes)** introducing yourself in both English and Cantonese or Mandarin, and briefly describing a situation where you had to communicate clearly across a language barrier in a professional setting



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.**



If you are fluent in both worlds, can hold a room in two languages, and take pride in making every client feel understood, this role puts you at the center of work that genuinely matters.

title: Customer Service Representative (Luxury and Fashion)
description:
We're looking for a Customer Service Representative with experience supporting high-end luxury or fashion brands to deliver a premium client experience. This is not a standard support role. The clients you serve expect a level of care, polish, and responsiveness that matches the brand they have chosen to engage with. Every interaction reflects the standard of the brand itself.



You will handle customer inquiries, resolve issues, and manage the full customer journey with the discretion, warmth, and professionalism that luxury clientele expect. If you have worked in a high-end retail, fashion, or luxury brand environment and understand what white-glove service actually looks like in practice, this role is a strong fit.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Client-facing role inside a premium brand environment where your communication sets the tone

- Opportunity to build long-term relationships with high-value customers



 What You'll Work On



Premium Customer Support



- Handle inbound inquiries from luxury brand customers via
, chat, or phone with professionalism and warmth

- Resolve order issues, returns, exchanges, and complaints in a way that protects the customer relationship and reflects brand standards

- Anticipate customer needs and go beyond transactional responses to deliver a genuinely premium experience

- Manage escalations with composure and escalate internally when situations require senior involvement



Order and Account Management



- Track and manage customer orders, shipping updates, and delivery inquiries accurately

- Coordinate with internal teams and third-party partners to resolve fulfillment or product issues

- Maintain accurate customer records and interaction histories

- Follow up proactively on open cases without waiting to be asked



Brand Representation



- Uphold brand voice, tone, and communication standards in every customer interaction

- Adapt communication style to match the expectations of high-net-worth or brand-loyal clientele

- Represent the brand with discretion, attention to detail, and genuine care for the customer experience



 What You Bring



- Experience in customer service for a luxury brand, fashion label, or premium retail environment

- Polished written and verbal communication skills in English with a strong command of tone and professionalism

- Ability to handle sensitive customer situations with composure and discretion

- High attention to detail and a genuine sense of ownership over every customer interaction

- Organized, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple open cases without dropping details

- Comfortable working fully remotely with a high degree of self-direction



Nice to Have



- Direct experience with fashion, accessories, or lifestyle luxury brands

- Familiarity with luxury e-commerce platforms or CRM tools used in premium retail

- Experience working with international or high-net-worth clientele

- Multilingual ability, particularly in French, Italian, or Spanish



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your updated resume

2. A short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes) introducing yourself, describing your experience with luxury or fashion brands, and sharing how you handled a difficult customer situation while maintaining brand standards



Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.



If you understand what luxury service actually means, communicate with polish and precision, and want to represent a premium brand where every interaction matters, this role gives you the platform and the ownership to deliver it at the highest level.

title: Executive Assistant (Manufacturing Operations)
description:
We're looking for an **Executive Assistant** to support the founder of a privately held manufacturing business. The work is straightforward: phones, calendar, scheduling, and day-to-day administrative tasks handled reliably and without needing to be chased.



The business is stable, focused, and not trying to be something it is not. If you are looking for a straightforward role where your job is to keep things organized and the founder's time protected, this is a strong fit.



Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Up to 14 days of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Direct working relationship with the founder from day one

- Stable, long-term role with room to grow as trust is established



What You'll Work On



Phone and Communication Management



- Answer and manage inbound calls on behalf of the founder

- Screen, triage, and route calls and messages appropriately

- Draft and send routine correspondence as directed

- Follow up on open items and ensure nothing falls through the cracks



Calendar and Schedule Management



- Own the founder's calendar and keep it clean, accurate, and current

- Schedule and confir
etings, calls, and appointments

- Coordinate with external contacts to align availability

- Anticipate scheduling conflicts and resolve them proactively



Administrative Support



- Handle day-to-day administrative tasks including data entry, document management, and file organization

- Manage basic record keeping and maintain organized systems for contacts, documents, and recurring tasks

- Support ad hoc requests as they arise and close loops without being reminded

- Help build simple processes and routines that make operations run more smoothly over time



What You Bring



- Prior experience in an executive assistant, administrative assistant, or similar support role

- Reliable phone presence and strong verbal communication skills

- Excellent written communication with attention to detail

- High organizational skills and comfort managing a busy calendar

- Self-directed and proactive: you spot what needs handling and you handle it

- Trustworthy, discreet, and consistent in how you show up every day

- Comfortable working independently in a remote setup without daily check-ins



Nice to Have



- Experience supporting a founder, owner, or solo executive directly

- Background in manufacturing, trades, or operational businesses

- Familiarity with basic bookkeeping or vendor coordination



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your updated resume

2. A short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes) introducing yourself and describing how you have managed a busy calendar or kept a demanding executive organized in a previous role



Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.



If you are dependable, organized, and take pride in making someone else's day run smoothly, this role gives you a direct line to the founder and the chance to build something from the ground up.

title: Executive Assistant (Operations-Focused)
description:
We’re seeking a proactive, detail-oriented **Executive Assistant** to support our CEO and leadership team in day-to-day operations, coordination, and special projects.



This role covers core EA responsibilities—managing inboxes, calendars, CRMs, and documentation—but goes beyond that. We’re looking for someone who can take initiative, think independently, and help drive operational and strategic tasks forward with minimal guidance.



Ideal candidates are early in their career, hungry to learn, AI-curious, and excited to grow in a fast-paced digital marketing agency environment.



---



### **Core Responsibilities**



**Executive Support**



- Manage the CEO’s inbox and calendar efficiently, prioritizing key communications

- Draft and send routine correspondence independently

- Track follow-ups to ensure nothing falls through the cracks



**CRM & Sales Support**



- Maintain HubSpot, keeping pipelines and records accurate

- Support client onboarding documentation and coordination

- Track sales stages and update relevant data



**Documentation & Contracts**



- Draft MSAs, NDAs, and basic agreements using templates

- Coordinate signatures and maintain organized contract records



---



### **Growth Opportunities**



As you gain experience, you’ll also:



- Take ownership of operational tasks from start to finish

- Research vendors, tools, and processes, providing actionable recommendations

- Support project coordination across marketing, sales, and operations

- Streamline workflows using AI and automation tools

- Help implement systems to reduce manual work and boost efficiency



---



### **Who We’re Looking For**



**Mindset & Attitude**



- Energetic, resourceful, and proactive

- Comfortable in a fast-moving startup or agency environment

- Strong sense of ownership and accountability

- Eager to learn and grow



**Skills & Requirements**



- Excellent written and spoken English (C2 level)

- Willing to work EST hours

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Comfortable working independently

- Strong digital literacy



**Bonus Skills**



- Experience with HubSpot or other CRMs

- Interest in AI beyond basic tools like ChatGPT



---



### **Compensation & Benefits**



- Fully remote role

- Opportunity to grow into broader operations or strategic responsibilities over time



---



### **How to Apply**



Please submit:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **Loom introduction video** sharing your relevant experience and why this role excites you



If you’re organized, proactive, and energized by supporting a fast-paced team while learning operations from the ground up, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Web Designer
description:
Job Title: Web Designer



We are seeking a highly creative and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to join our team as a dedicated web designer, focusing on crafting visually appealing and functional websites for our US-based clients using WordPress/Elementor.



Responsibilities:



- Design visually stunning, user-friendly websites using WordPress and Elementor based on client requirements and creative briefs.

- Create wireframes, mockups, and prototypes using design tools to present concepts to clients and tea
mbers.

- Collaborate with project managers to ensure designs align with client branding and project objectives.

- Implement website designs primarily through Elementor’s drag-and-drop interface, with minor tweaks to layouts or styles as needed.

- Ensure websites are optimized for aesthetics, responsiveness, and client satisfaction, conducting quality checks before delivery.



Qualifications:



- Strong design sensibility with a portfolio showcasing website designs, ideally built with WordPress and Elementor.

- Proficiency in WordPress and Elementor for designing and building websites using drag-and-drop functionality.

- Experience with at least one design tool such as Figma, Adobe Illustrator, or Canva for creating mockups or graphics.

- Basic understanding of website functionality; no heavy coding knowledge required (HTML/CSS is a plus but not mandatory).

- Excellent communication skills in English, both verbal and written, to discuss designs and collaborate with the team.

- Flexible schedule to accommodate US business hours (evening/night shifts in Philippines time).



Our Team & Culture:



We’re proud to have a fantastic team, including other talented VAs from the Philippines. We work as a unit, so we’re looking for someone who’s enjoyable to work with and a great culture fit. This role starts as part-time but is expected to scale to full-time within the next 3 months as our agency grows.



Benefits:



- Fantastic culture

- Remote work with flexible hours

- Opportunity to work with a diverse international clientele and grow your web design expertise



Roadmap:



Month 1: Part-Time Onboarding - Start part-time at $4/hour, learning our processes, collaborating on initial projects, and delivering high-quality designs using WordPress and Elementor. You’ll be working 1on1 with our head designer from day one.



Month 2: Growth & Impact - Take on more projects, refine your workflow, and contribute creative ideas. Exceptional work earns project-based bonuses for killer designs that wow our clients.



Month 3: Full-Time Transition - Scale to a full-time role as our agency expands, with the potential for hourly rate increases based on performance and impact. Continue earning bonuses for outstanding project delivery.



To Apply:



- Include any portfolio work you have completed in the past

- Send a video introduction (2-3 minutes) where you introduce yourself, explain why you would be a great fit for this role, and discuss any relevant experience you have had in the past with your application.

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Ads (Performance-Focused)
description:
We’re looking for a reliable video editor to help our agency clear a backlog of short-form ad creatives and support ongoing client work.



Right now, we have an immediate backlog of approximately 12–20 short-form ads that need fast turnaround. We’re open to starting with a freelance/part-time arrangement, with the potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit.



What we need



You’ll be editing short-form video ads for client campaigns.



This is not about flashy edits for the sake of it.



We care most about:

- strong hooks

- clear messaging

- good pacing

- emotional impact

- edits that make the viewer feel something and take action



We want someone who understands that the goal of the edit is performance — not just making the video “look cool.”



Responsibilities

- Edit short-form ad videos quickly and reliably

- Work primarily in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Create clean, engaging, performance-focused edits

- Add captions, pacing, b-roll, graphics, and structure where needed

- Follow briefs and feedback carefully

- Turn around edits fast, sometimes ASAP

- Make revisions quickly when required



Ideal candidate

You’re a strong fit if you are:

- reliable and communicative

- fast without sacrificing quality

- experienced in short-form ad editing

- able to follow direction well

- able to identify what makes a video message stronger

- comfortable editing content designed to convert, not just entertain



Bonus if you also understand

- ad messaging

- hooks and retention

- direct response marketing

- how to shape footage into something clearer and more persuasive



Important

We are not looking for someone who relies on flashy transitions or over-editing.

We are looking for someone who can help make videos:



- clearer

- more persuasive

- more emotionally effective

- faster to deliver



Current need

- Immediate backlog: approx. 12–20 short-form ads

- Fast turnaround preferred

- Start as freelance/part-time

- Potential for more consistent ongoing work if it’s a good fit



To apply, complete this short application form:





A short note on how you think about making an ad more compelling — beyond just editing



Please include the word PACING in your application so we know you read this properly.

title: Care Navigator
description:
PLEASE APPLY ON OUR WEBSITE: 



About ReKlame Health 



Sixty million adults experience mental health challenges in the United States, yet one-third lack access to proper care. Opioid overdose is the number one cause of death for people under 50 in the United States. 



We are a clinician-led, tech-enabled provider group that exists to provide culturally competent behavioral health care addiction care, medication management, crisis intervention, and care coordination for people working towards taking back control of their lives, while expanding access to care.



Our vision at ReKlame Health is to create a future where individuals who have historically been unable to access the care they deserve can readily obtain high-quality behavioral health and addiction care. 



At ReKlame Health, it goes beyond mere employment; it's about becoming a part of a formidable movement transcending individuality. Let's unite and forge a world where health equity and effortless access to exceptional mental healthcare can co-exist.



Care Navigator Role (Remote - Philippines)







As a Care Navigator, your main goal will be to give our clients the best experience possible by being the welcoming face of the company. You will schedule appointments, help clients in the onboarding process, answer client questions and concerns, and do other tasks that support our clinicians as they support our clients. 







Your role at ReKlame Health would include:



-Contracting 40 hours a week on tasks assigned to you according to the job description

- Manage office telephone system, including answering incoming calls and returning messages

- Scheduling appointments for our clients and practitioners 

- Close monitorization for last minute rescheduling of appointments for therapy; ensure clients are booked for their next appointment.

-Managing clinician calendars

-Entering client personal health information and other clinical data

-Conduct high-risk screenings 

-Run prescription history reports through prescription monitoring platform

-Eligibility checks for prescription refills

-Locating pharmacies in the event medication is out of stock at the patient’s usual pharmacy

-Submitting lab requests (EKG, psychological, pharmacogenetic, etc)

-Responding to prior authorization, form, letter and other paperwork requests

-Collaborating care with external providers

-Monitor and help facilitate client onboarding, ensuring client intakes are submitted and fully completed prior to the first visit

-Other tasks associated with this position



You’ll love this role if:



-Superb Communicator: Excellent verbal and written communication.

-Tech and Data-Savvy: Easily picks up on unfamiliar technologies and thrives to organize, analyze and plug in data. 

-Compassionate: Naturally compassionate and empathetic to patients needing mental health care.

-Scrappy Problem Solver: Enthusiasm for operating in an early-stage startup, using limited resources efficiently to create outsized results. 

-Mission-Driven: Dedicated to increasing access to mental health and substance use treatment for those in need. 

-Open to providing support on the weekends (I.e. weekly schedule of Wed-Sun, Thurs - Mon, etc.)



What We Offer You:



-Be a part of a mission-driven mental health startup and play a direct role in changing the lives of countless individuals.



-Collaborate with a team of like-minded leaders to support your growth along the way 



-A robust training program



-Remote work setting



-Opportunity to earn performance-based bonuses in recognition of your contributions and commitment to our mission.



-Opportunity for upskilling, professional development, and general growth within the organization.



We look forward to finding someone who is passionate about mental health and helping clients find the right fit to begin or continue their journey to complete mental health. We hope to hear from you soon!

title: Radiant Protocol | Content and Marketing Operator
description:
Applications that do not follow instructions exactly will not be reviewed.



Radiant Protocol is a skincare technology company building structured skin treatment protocols using LED light therapy devices and targeted serums.



We are not a traditional beauty brand.



Radiant Protocol develops skin optimization systems built around structured treatment routines.



Our system integrates



LED skincare technology

targeted serum formulas

structured skincare routines



We are currently preparing for product launch and building the marketing infrastructure that will support the brand.



We are hiring a Content and Marketing Operator to help build the marketing engine before launch.



Role Overview



This role focuses on



content creation

content research

 marketing drafts

landing page support

marketing organization

content systems



You will help build the marketing foundation before launch.



This is not a generic VA position. We are looking for someone organized, creative, and capable of producing high quality marketing work.



We are looking for someone interested in a long term role with a growing company, not short term freelance work.



What You Will Do



Content creation



Write captions and educational posts

Create Instagram carousel drafts using Canva

Edit short form videos using CapCut or similar tools

Develop content ideas related to skincare and LED therapy



Marketing support



Draft
 newsletters

Assist with landing page content

Help organize marketing funnels and workflows

Assist with GoHighLevel marketing setup



Research



Research LED skincare technology topics

Analyze competitor content and positioning

Generate new content ideas weekly



Organization



Organize Google Drive marketing folders

Maintain content libraries and templates

Build swipe files and reference folders



Tools We Use



GoHighLevel

Canva

CapCut

Google Drive

AI writing tools



Experience with these tools is helpful but not required if you can learn quickly.



Requirements



Strong written English

Clear professional communication

Basic Canva design ability

Ability to edit short form videos

Highly organized and detail oriented

Able to follow structured instructions carefully



Attention to detail matters in this role. Candidates who carefully read job descriptions tend to perform best in our environment. When applying, include the word blue somewhere naturally in your message so we know you reviewed the description carefully.



Preferred Experience



 marketing

Landing page building

GoHighLevel experience

Skincare or wellness content creation



Application Instructions



Your application must include the following.



The first line of your message must contain the word



PROTOCOL



Include a Loom video introduction.



Record a short 1 to 2 minute Loom video introducing yourself and explaining your experience with



Canva

short form video editing

content writing



Include links or screenshots of at least two examples of work you created.



Acceptable examples include



Instagram carousels

short form video edits

caption writing

blog posts



Writing Prompt



Radiant Protocol believes skin improvement comes from consistent routines rather than random products.



In two or three sentences explain why consistent skincare routines are important.



Please write this answer in your own words. Responses that appear to be copied directly from ChatGPT or other AI tools tend to sound generic and will not be prioritized during review.



Content Thinking Task



Create three content ideas for a skincare brand that sells LED light therapy devices.



For each idea include



topic

hook

one sentence caption



Diagnostic Questions



Describe a situation where you were given a task with limited instructions. What did you do?



How do you stay organized when managing multiple tasks or deadlines?



If you were responsible for creating content for a skincare technology brand, what type of content would you create first and why?



Applications missing any of the following will not be reviewed



PROTOCOL in the first line

Loom video introduction

portfolio examples

writing prompt response

content ideas

diagnostic answers

title: Medical Assistant
description:
APPLY DIRECTLY ON OUR WEBSITE! 



About ReKlame Health 



Headquartered in the dynamic and innovative hub of New York City, ReKlame Health is dedicated to redefining the landscape of behavioral health and addiction care with passion and purpose.



As a clinician-led startup, we are committed to delivering culturally competent care in mental health, addiction treatment, medication management, crisis intervention, and care coordination for adults. Our mission is to expand access to care. We are deeply committed to providing support to BIPOC communities and historically marginalized groups who face profound challenges tied to severe mental illness and addiction.



Our vision at ReKlame Health is to create a future where individuals who have historically been unable to access the care they deserve can readily obtain high-quality behavioral health and addiction care. We are dedicated to reducing disparities in access to evidence-based, culturally competent mental health care and promoting health equity.



At ReKlame Health, it goes beyond mere employment; it's about becoming a part of a formidable movement transcending individuality. Let's unite and forge a world where health equity and effortless access to exceptional mental healthcare coexist harmoniously for millions of Americans.



Medical Assistant Role (Remote)



As a Medical Assistant, your main goal will be to provide comprehensive support to the Care team, which includes both providers and care navigators.



Your role at ReKlame Health would include:

-Contracting 40 hours a week on tasks assigned to you according to the job description

-Calendar management

-Data entry and record maintenance

-Generating and utilizing specialized reports

-Backend support for the Care team

-Other tasks assigned to you by the Care Navigator Lead





You’ll love this role if:



-Superb Communicator: Excellent verbal and written communication.

-Tech and Data-Savvy: Easily picks up on unfamiliar technologies and thrives to organize, analyze and plug in data. 

-Compassionate: Naturally compassionate and empathetic to patients needing mental health care.

-Scrappy Problem Solver: Enthusiasm for operating in an early-stage startup, using limited resources efficiently to create outsized results. 

-Mission-Driven: Dedicated to increasing access to mental health and substance use treatment for those in need. 



What We Offer You



-Be a part of a mission-driven mental health startup and play a direct role in changing the lives of countless individuals.

-Collaborate with a team of like-minded leaders to support your growth along the way 

-A robust training program

-Remote work setting

-Opportunity to earn performance-based bonuses in recognition of your contributions and commitment to our mission.

-Opportunity for upskilling, professional development, and general growth within the organization.



We look forward to finding someone who is passionate about mental health and helping clients find the right fit to begin or continue their journey to complete mental health. We hope to hear from you soon!

title: Business Operations & Systems Organiser (Full-Time | Build Systems)
description:
JOB TITLE

Business Operations & Systems Organiser (Full-Time | Build Systems, Own Financial Tracking)



---



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are hiring a Business Operations and Systems Organiser to join a growing Australian operation on a full-time, long-term basis.



This role is about building the financial and operational backbone of the business. You will create and maintain systems that track income, expenses, and cash position across dozens of accounts, reconcile transactions in Xero, produce weekly financial summaries for the operator, and help keep the business organised day to day. The systems do not exist yet - you will be designing and building them with direction from the operator.



If you have worked in finance admin, bookkeeping, data operations, e-commerce operations, or any role where tracking numbers and building reports was a regular part of your work - and you are genuinely comfortable using AI tools to work faster and smarter - we want to hear from you.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time role, 40 hours per week

* Stable, long-term position with an Australian business

* PHP 33,500 starting salary, increasing to PHP 35,000 after probation

* 13th month pay and government-mandated benefits

* Fully remote - work from home



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Build and maintain expense tracking systems linked to individual accounts, so the operator can see at any time what each account has cost and what it has returned

* Track total funds across accounts and pending withdrawal positions

* Reconcile Xero accounts and keep bookkeeping up to date on a regular cadence

* Produce weekly financial summaries covering balances, expenses, profit per account, and account purchasing rate versus profit

* Flag anomalies in the numbers before they become problems

* Take the lead on designing solutions when new tracking needs arise - ask the right questions, then go and build it

* Help the operator stay organised day to day - following up on pending items and keeping things moving

* Some coordination with a second VA on the execution side where workflows connect



---



REQUIREMENTS



* Genuinely comfortable with numbers - able to spot when something does not add up and work confidently with financial data

* Strong with spreadsheets - Airtable, Google Sheets, or similar; able to build structured tracking systems without hand-holding

* Comfortable with Xero or genuinely confident in learning it quickly

* Proactive - moves without being chased, asks questions when needed, and flags issues early

* Strong written English - produces clear, accurate summaries and reports

* Actively uses AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) as a regular part of how you work - not just occasionally

* Comfortable working in an environment where the systems are still being built and the brief is not always fully defined upfront

* Reliable computer and internet connection



---



NICE TO HAVE



* Prior bookkeeping or accounting experience

* Familiarity with Airtable (building views, formulas, linked records)

* Experience building operational dashboards or reporting systems

* Background in e-commerce, trading, finance admin, or any data-driven business



---



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Monday to Friday

* Australian daytime hours (AEST/AEDT) - target 10am to 6pm AEST



---



If you are someone who finds it natural to look at a messy financial picture and build something that makes it clear - and you are ready to do that work independently in a fast-moving Australian operation - apply now.

description:
We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Customer Service Virtual Assistant to support our growing portfolio of e-commerce skincare and personal care brands. This is a full-time role (40 hours/week) handling customer inquiries, order management, and subscription support across multiple Shopify stores.



You'll be the first point of contact for customers across three active brands (with a fourth launching soon), using pre-written templates and SOPs to resolve tickets quickly and accurately. All brands operate on the same tech stack: Gorgias for helpdesk, Shopify for orders, Skio for subscriptions, and we coordinate with our fulfillment warehouse through Slack.



This is an SOP-driven role. You will be given clear instructions, templates, and processes for every task. We're looking for someone who follows directions precisely and asks questions before acting.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Respond to customer
s and messages via Gorgias (or similar technology) across all brands using pre-written templates

- Handle order inquiries: tracking updates, missing items, order modifications, cancellations

- Process change-of-address requests before orders ship

- Process returns and exchanges following step-by-step SOPs

- Coordinate with our fulfillment warehouse via Slack for reships and address issues

- Monitor orders for address verification flags and resolve them via SMS outreach

- Help customers with subscription questions and direct them to the self-service portal

- Investigate subscription disputes by reviewing audit logs and order history before responding

- Context-switch between brands while keeping tone, policies, and products straight

- Escalate anything outside your SOPs to the team lead before taking action



GROWTH OPPORTUNITY:

This role has a clear path to a team lead / CS manager position. As we scale, we'll be hiring additional VAs, and the right person in this role will help train new tea
mbers, manage the CS team, and report directly to the founder. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Strong written English — clear, friendly, and professional

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

- Available to work during US business hours (overlap with 9 AM – 8 PM Pacific Time required)

- Experience with customer service or virtual assistant work (preferred but not required)

- Experience handling multiple clients, accounts, or brands is a strong plus

- Familiarity with Shopify, Gorgias, Skio, Slack, or similar tools is a plus

- Detail-oriented — you follow instructions carefully and don't skip steps

- Comfortable asking questions rather than guessing



COMPENSATION & DETAILS:

- $3.50/hour USD, 40 hours/week; and up depending on experience and fit

- Paid weekly via PayPal (every Monday for the previous week)

- 13th month bonus paid in December

- Long-term position with clear path to team lead / CS manager role

- Start date: As soon as possible



HOW TO APPLY:

Please include a brief message about your experience with customer service and why you'd be a great fit. Bonus points if you've managed CS for multiple brands or clients, or if you've used Gorgias, Shopify, Skio, or Slack.



We'll review applications and reach out to schedule a short introductory call via Google Meet.

title: AVAILABLE ROLES AT A GLANCE (with Healthcare Insurance Experience)
description:
WHAT WE OFFER

-Compensation & Benefits

-Competitive compensation 

-Monthly Company Bonus Program

-Paid Vacation Leave

-Healthcare Insurance

-PhilHealth Insurance

-Internet Allowance

-Holiday Bonus

-Work Environment & Growth

-100% remote work — work from anywhere with a stable internet connection



INSURANCE VERIFICATION, PRIOR AUTHORIZATION & REVERIFICATION KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Handle end-to-end insurance verification for new DME patients (urology, ostomy, catheter) via portal and phone, validating insurance information and HCPC codes, documenting results, and routing to appropriate teams. Manage the full prior authorization lifecycle — collecting clinical documentation, submitting requests to payers, tracking status, initiating re-authorizations ahead of reorder dates, and flagging denials or appeals to internal contacts. Conduct reverifications for existing patients with coverage changes, maintain the daily reverification queue, provide overflow support during high-volume periods, and flag patterns that may indicate seasonal spikes. Ensure accurate documentation across all verification and authorization interactions.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Minimum 3 years of experience in US medical insurance verification, prior authorization, or RCM — REQUIRED

Prior Authorization (PA) and Insurance Verification (IV) experience — REQUIRED

Healthcare experience — REQUIRED

Working knowledge of US payer portals (Availity, NaviMed, UHC, BCBS, Cigna, etc.)

Familiarity with HCPC codes and DME billing requirements, including ostomy and catheter products

Experience handling Medicare and Medicare Advantage plans

Strong English communication skills — written and verbal (phone calls to US payers required)

Ability to manage multi-stage caseloads with concurrent active authorizations

Familiarity with insurance change workflows, COB (coordination of benefits), and plan terminations

Close attention to detail and the ability to maintain quality under volume pressure

Comfortable working US Eastern Time hours remotely from any location

Experience in DME, urology, ostomy, catheter, home health, or specialty medical billing



Apply Now!

title: Solar PV System Designer (US Residential & Commercial)
description:
We are looking to hire a Solar PV Designer to support our US-based solar installation projects.



This role is intended for candidates based in the Philippines who have experience designing solar PV systems for the US market.



Responsibilities:

• Create accurate PV layouts using Aurora Solar and AutoCAD

• Prepare Single Line Diagrams (SLD), electrical layouts, and permit plan sets

• Perform shading analysis, system sizing, and energy modelling

• Prepare Bill of Materials (BOM) and design documentation

• Ensure designs comply with NEC and AHJ requirements

• Revise designs based on QC feedback, utility comments, and permitting requirements

• Support interconnection and permitting teams as needed

• Familiarity to Google Sheets/Excel and CRM software.



Work Schedule:

• Total working time: 50 hours per week (5.5 working days)

• Monday to Friday: 9 hours per day (45 hours) and Saturday: 5 hours



This is a long-term position. Salary is fixed with flexibility for strong and experienced candidates.

title: Bookkeeper with Executive/Admin Assistant experience
description:
Position: Bookkeeper with Executive/Admin Assistant Experience

Location: Remote



Allied Assist is a dynamic and forward-thinking organization dedicated to providing high-level virtual support services to growing businesses. We take pride in our commitment to efficiency, professionalism, and client success. As we continue to expand, we are looking for talented individuals who thrive in a fast-paced, client-focused environment. We value accountability, initiative, and a solutions-driven mindset.



Role Overview:

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented professional who can confidently handle both bookkeeping responsibilities and executive/admin support. This role is ideal for someone who is not only strong with numbers but also capable of managing day-to-day operations and supporting leadership with administrative tasks.



Key Responsibilities:



Financial Management:



Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records using QuickBooks or similar platforms

Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable

Reconcile bank and credit card statements

Prepare financial reports and summaries as needed



Payroll & Compliance:



Process payroll accurately and on time

Ensure compliance with relevant financial regulations and requirements

Assist with basic tax preparation support and documentation



Executive & Administrative Support:



Provide direct support to business owners or executives

Manage
s, calendars, and scheduling

Assist with data entry, document organization, and reporting

Support project coordination and task tracking (e.g., ClickUp or similar tools)



Communication & Coordination:



Communicate clearly with clients and internal teams

Provide financial insights in a simple, understandable way

Respond promptly and professionally to inquiries



Qualifications:



Bookkeeping Expertise:



Proven experience in bookkeeping and financial management

Strong understanding of accounting principles

Proficiency in QuickBooks or similar accounting software



Executive/Admin Experience:



Experience supporting executives or business owners

Strong organizational and multitasking skills

Ability to manage priorities and meet deadlines independently



Technical & Communication Skills:



Excellent written and verbal communication

High attention to detail and accuracy

Comfortable using project management and communication tools



Work Ethic & Mindset:



Proactive, reliable, and solution-oriented

Strong sense of ownership and accountability

Interest in long-term growth and professional development



Join Allied Assist and be part of a team that values excellence, efficiency, and impact.

title: React and Next.JS developer for huge HR tech project
description:
I have a complete Figma file with roughly 165 unique screens (some are just modal popups) but I have a full design system created. All artwork, typography scales, colour tokens and interaction notes are ready. This is a full scale technology app - in the HR tech space. What I’m missing is an experienced front-end engineer who can turn that large design set into clean, maintainable code.



If you need a reference point, think of creating something like Rippling or Bullhorn from scratch.



I am a senior level product designer and manager who spent the last two years at a complex Series A funded $300m startup with 200 people. If you do not have extensive experience yourself, this will not be for you. You will not be able to vibe code your way to success here, although use of Claude Code will be useful as you navigate such a big project at speed.



I've logged 400 hours working on these designs to take all the guesswork out of this project but this will required a very experienced front end developer. We will have fun!



In your response please state the biggest project you've worked on specifically using React, and working with a framework and using like Jira or Linear where you were part of a larger team in a proper company. State the size of the company in people, and your role, and your contribution, in that order, please.



This will be a fun project to work. I look forward to hearing from you!

title: Front End Engineer (AI First Product) (CS Graduate)
description:
Flexible working hours - I'm a US based Product Design Engineer who has built an enterprise level, AI Native, HR Technology product. It's almost ready to launch and I'm looking for its first employee to do many things. I built the whole product using Claude Code. It's 260,000 lines of code with many integrations and APIs. 



You will be someone, maybe even a fresh Computer Science grad with little experience, who is obsessed with AI and want's to get your hands dirty on a big project. There will be lots to do. In the beginning there will be a lot of testing of features - that's really a tester's job, but its one example of where one person can do many things. You'll be debugging big issues, innovating on new products, conducting market research. The aim is for you to become obsessed with the product and utilizing AI to become more efficient. I've been doing many things to date and some bug fixes just take a while and now we're moving to launch, I need to focus my efforts elsewhere. 



I don't need someone who is a very technical engineer - you know too much - I need people who will rely on AI to help figure it out and do things much more quickly. 



This will suit someone who is very proactive, very smart, and can deal with many moving parts at once. You will be given a lot of responsibility and there are a lot of things you can break, so you need to be hyper switched on love chaos and working hard. If that's not you, I totally get it.

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
Job Description:



Full-Time | Work From Home | Ecommerce & Influencer Partnerships



SRI Labs is a fast-growing, premium beauty & wellness ecommerce brand known for high-end skincare, hair tools, and breakthrough consumer products. We’re looking for a driven, organized, and relationship-focused Affiliate Manager to lead and scale our affiliate program across platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, and key influencer networks.



If you love partnering with creators, optimizing affiliate performance, and helping a brand grow through relationships — this is the role for you.



What You’ll Do



As our Affiliate Manager, you will own the entire affiliate ecosystem and work directly with the CEO and marketing leadership team to scale creator-led revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize SRI Labs’ affiliate program across ShopMy, Levanta, and other affiliate platforms.

Recruit, vet, and onboard new affiliates, creators, and influencers that align with our brand.

Build strong long-term relationships with partners to drive consistent revenue and brand growth.

Track performance, payouts, ROI, and ensure all affiliates are supported with assets, codes, and campaigns.

Coordinate affiliate-driven launches, seasonal promotions, and strategic campaigns.

Identify top performers and build incentive strategies to maximize their output.

Maintain reporting dashboards and communicate results to leadership weekly.

Collaborate with internal marketing, product, design, and operations teams to support affiliate needs.

Continuously test new platforms, creators, strategies, and incentives to grow revenue.

Who You Are



We’re looking for someone who is:



Based in the Philippines

Experienced in affiliate, influencer marketing, or digital partnerships (1–3+ years preferred).

Organized, reliable, and able to manage many creators and campaigns at once.

Strong at relationship-building — someone affiliates love to work with.

Comfortable working within platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, Impact, or similar tools.

Data-driven with excellent follow-through and communication skills.

Hungry, proactive, and passionate about helping a brand grow.

Why Join SRI Labs?



Remote work

Work directly with a high-performing founding team

Competitive salary based on experience

Long-term growth potential within a fast-scaling ecommerce company

Supportive, positive culture built around speed, innovation, and passion for great products

Opportunity to make a big impact — your work will directly drive revenue and brand expansion

How to Apply



 your resume and a quick 2–3 sentence introduction 



Subject Line: Affiliate Manager – [Your Name]



Include:



Links to affiliate programs or creators you’ve worked with

Any relevant platforms/tools you’ve used

Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)

Job Type: Full-time
